subject: Do you have a minute?

body:
|

Peter,

**We can’t let Joe Biden add a liberal activist to the Supreme Court of the United States.**

Mitch McConnell recently said that if he was Majority Leader in 2024 under Joe Biden and there was a Supreme Court vacancy, he would NOT fill it.

| Do you agree a Republican Senate Majority should NOT let Joe Biden fill a potential Supreme Court vacancy in 2024?
[** YES **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ec2e724ba634c67924a2cb3e0c86f4e&_e=DnpOGP7wJGT8m-jKYjhTD4Q6moPmiQxD_XvSc_4-AwiLg1kQfmKHXq50L6axlV4ZgOOJKMeDHMa0lfu7NX-_2ov_V4sVVoaMLj5X7SJQbKrDurNS-Gw_y3wL9I-mGM7XV8yq7E9bKZrRdOE3BCSH7QV6pKu2Fry42REuygbQnVBzsFSEFfLbFZHzDFc4a8HUWuXAE11NfBDIhC581hAtm46hB-lbLIUFS2hYbIaOJQ8TNGjixMqxwE-vt8jVSCmgCLNCeBVwVYc_RJzBe-hXedd7W2fCzF8Fgpefl7mhJ8P7V20TFW9JsZTFbsS5GrdGX4hyIJ1B9HLJ8LBzR3FVU-Ecag7m-d2MCqKtrZ51_lyk4RvSLsn6AWwrrb43gHOndvuIB-WIT78GvWW5JigLRjVOUHg6oUfLDOMY6aWyHwdtNYMK1qkgVAOgPQgkZQoHTERgn3gVEpjq_WOsV8zSlygL_rcm2uTYOc4tsZs6NRM%3D)
[** No **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9ec2e724ba634c67924a2cb3e0c86f4e&_e=DnpOGP7wJGT8m-jKYjhTD4Q6moPmiQxD_XvSc_4-AwiLg1kQfmKHXq50L6axlV4ZgOOJKMeDHMa0lfu7NX-_2ov_V4sVVoaMLj5X7SJQbKrDurNS-Gw_y3wL9I-mGM7XV8yq7E9bKZrRdOE3BCSH7QV6pKu2Fry42REuygbQnVBzsFSEFfLbFZHzDFc4a8HUWuXAE11NfBDIhC581hAtm46hB-lbLIUFS2hYbIaOJQ8TNGjixMqxwE-vt8jVSCmgCLNCeBVwVYc_RJzBe-hXeXmsWYYjPB6Vn7yF18yON1vXEBQOqrn98RLRqMfsf_ZqlZ7UJmqDbjYgF-oeYzY_txmflbdFUQkSbTO1o0GYVE3-UpN1S__CUGezDcwdYDdu3Et518c9fGVix5UIxiWBgg_rSCKfOD9jgnBBGel0hzlyxEhIcZBUDuVNr_RnRShcmvH6SrMxVL7R67BbhZYmtIBDP9OZunnkvzRjSyWu_fw%3D)

Biden and his cronies are trying to destroy America and its freedoms, and having a liberal majority on the Supreme Court is the easiest way to make sure that happens.

**_Make YOUR VOICE heard._** We need YOU to help us tell Democrats how much Americans don’t want a liberal activist on the Supreme Court.

Thank you,

The National Republican Senate Committee

name: Team Cammack
subject: Defend the First Amendment today!
body:
Kat is proud to join Rep. Jim Jordan to launch the Campus Free Speech Caucus.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7d1sDATe1EvsNVAogGSOJ_6AXwj-oT4saNi8xHsa18sUw_Ll5vJ-3KWlBwbbGQqiAhskMYjq4M9UsiAnUNPfLJf3F5mXnvQGdvPNRtdXLnjjWZig_EEcBeJxOq47w4WAxAFS1pwssTGMNyQhY3qCde_dQzJVAshU7lT0Xb9c1MEeJ9yfIAuj7YVErBdDqfbcIr3mbnJ9RFh05_VEp6m9g==&c=wjEc24CXV23bRXu_FIKE6ronmIxHG6xxRFkvKL58gZ8KttfCN8cPNw==&ch=ZX8B6844O_mT1J8SegKDymOYMMSbQuXM852fjHQ6XsKeQo2vxTd_Ow==)
---
| Friend,

Kat is proud to join Rep. Jim Jordan to launch the Campus Free Speech Caucus. We need to fight back against the radical left's indoctrination camps on our college campuses.
For far too long, conservatives have played defense on college campuses, but our Freedom of Speech is under attack at these institutions, which is why we need to fight back. [Are you with us?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7d1sDATe1EvsNVAogGSOJ_6AXwj-oT4saNi8xHsa18sUw_Ll5vJ-3KWlBwbbGQqiAhskMYjq4M9UsiAnUNPfLJf3F5mXnvQGdvPNRtdXLnjjWZig_EEcBeJxOq47w4WAxAFS1pwssTGMNyQhY3qCde_dQzJVAshU7lT0Xb9c1MEeJ9yfIAuj7YVErBdDqfbcIr3mbnJ9RFh05_VEp6m9g==&c=wjEc24CXV23bRXu_FIKE6ronmIxHG6xxRFkvKL58gZ8KttfCN8cPNw==&ch=ZX8B6844O_mT1J8SegKDymOYMMSbQuXM852fjHQ6XsKeQo2vxTd_Ow==)
---
| | | [DEFEND THE FIRST AMENDMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7d1sDATe1EvsNVAogGSOJ_6AXwj-oT4saNi8xHsa18sUw_Ll5vJ-3KWlBwbbGQqiAhskMYjq4M9UsiAnUNPfLJf3F5mXnvQGdvPNRtdXLnjjWZig_EEcBeJxOq47w4WAxAFS1pwssTGMNyQhY3qCde_dQzJVAshU7lT0Xb9c1MEeJ9yfIAuj7YVErBdDqfbcIr3mbnJ9RFh05_VEp6m9g==&c=wjEc24CXV23bRXu_FIKE6ronmIxHG6xxRFkvKL58gZ8KttfCN8cPNw==&ch=ZX8B6844O_mT1J8SegKDymOYMMSbQuXM852fjHQ6XsKeQo2vxTd_Ow==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7d1sDATe1EvsNVAogGSOJ_6AXwj-oT4saNi8xHsa18sUw_Ll5vJ-3KWlBwbbGQqNUelFwPZfS929yZCNu174cS5Gx8FimomIyl3D2G753GMFc_LYjJYNKSRjvZSC95jhBsSqoxW4jti1A3cIWRrcjVBFDV9N-6RT7Y2rTpMUf1O6Q9HYxN-lOswRP6k3oanXqK5vnYggEdGOhFWj4n7vUkka7UjRU1FvSPrzARYkM0d50O4QQHctZXuz9IHWwqw-zx6-4NAjYPTCmrfMgNP2A==&c=wjEc24CXV23bRXu_FIKE6ronmIxHG6xxRFkvKL58gZ8KttfCN8cPNw==&ch=ZX8B6844O_mT1J8SegKDymOYMMSbQuXM852fjHQ6XsKeQo2vxTd_Ow==)
---
| It's critical that we end liberal indoctrination at our nation's colleges and universities. We are the land of the free, which is why we must continue to preserve our constitutional rights and freedoms even if it hurts someone's feelings.
When discussing the launch of this awesome initiative, Kat said:
"Together, we're sending the message that free speech is not only a constitutional right but also a core freedom that must be preserved on college campuses across the country. At a time when university leadership and students are caving to the pressure of liberal progressivism, my colleagues in Congress will stand up for the First Amendment and ensure all have the right to exercise their thoughts and ideas freely and without persecution."
Now more than ever, we must stand up for our constitutional rights and ensure the Radical Left is not able to stomp on our freedom of speech. Can Kat count on you to support this important initiative to preserve Free Speech on college campuses?
---

clean_body: Kat is proud to join Rep. Jim Jordan to launch the Campus Free Speech Caucus. | | | | | | == | Friend, Kat is proud to join Rep. Jim Jordan to launch the Campus Free Speech Caucus. We need to fight back against the radical left's indoctrination camps on our college campuses. For far too long, conservatives have played defense on college campuses, but our Freedom of Speech is under attack at these institutions, which is why we need to fight back. == | | | == | == | It's critical that we end liberal indoctrination at our nation's colleges and universities. We are the land of the free, which is why we must continue to preserve our constitutional rights and freedoms even if it hurts someone's feelings. When discussing the launch of this awesome initiative, Kat said: "Together, we're sending the message that free speech is not only a constitutional right but also a core freedom that must be preserved on college campuses across the country. At a time when university leadership and students are caving to the pressure of liberal progressivism, my colleagues in Congress will stand up for the First Amendment and ensure all have the right to exercise their thoughts and ideas freely and without persecution." Now more than ever, we must stand up for our constitutional rights and ensure the Radical Left is not able to stomp on our freedom of speech. Can Kat count on you to support this important initiative to preserve Free Speech on college campuses? | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For America, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: FWD: I hope you can join us on June 28th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw the invite for our end-of-quarter debrief on June 28th at 7PM ET.

I am looking forward to our conversation, so if you have not had a chance to RSVP, please use this link to let us know you can make it.

Thank you and hopefully, I will see you soon!

-- Stewart

--- Forwarded Message ---
Peter, I hope all is well!
Our campaign is hosting a debrief on Monday, June 28th at 7PM ET before our very first end-of-quarter deadline. Whether you have already supported or would just like to join to learn more about the campaign, all are welcome!
We launched our campaign on April 5th and we are off to a great start. As I talk with voters across the district, one thing is clear: folks are fed up with the status quo. I would love to share with you why I am running now, how our campaign is progressing and answering any questions you might have.
If you would like to RSVP, please use this link or you may click on the invitation below. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28]
Hopefully, I’ll see you soon!
-- Stewart Navarre
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq28]

| | The end of the second quarter is coming up next week, Derek, and if we don’t hit our goal, we’ll be outraised by Glenn Youngkin _**for the third time in a row.**_

That would be the worst possible outcome.

[**Please, pitch in $15 or whatever you can afford toward our end-of-quarter goal so Glenn Youngkin doesn’t outraise us yet again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31380008/292473506/1097049879?refcode=20210625.1_TFV_BW-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNhYjM2MC1jNGQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Awbj1LY1JbkHn6y9zfSLuL6a_BG-LQkjknQNgiElrIg=)

Youngkin’s already outspending us online, and if we aren’t careful, he’ll start outspending us on the air and on the ground, purchasing more misleading tv ads and blanketing the Commonwealth with field organizers.

We know we can beat him, Derek, but only if we match his fundraising, and we can’t do that if we miss this goal.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Fwd: AZ and NH: 2 of the most vulnerable seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Will you split a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's? | | |
---
Friends — I just wanted to make sure you saw my last email. National Republicans are focusing in on Arizona and New Hampshire to try to retake the Senate — Maggie and I need your support now more than ever. **[With our biggest fundraising deadline yet right around the corner, we need to show them we’re serious about defending these seats. Can you split $5 between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to help us fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31382528/292485038/1696179105?refcode=e20210625_mk-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQzMmNjMi1jOWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWE6zArnrN2-yBuxh_3Hrd0VB3Lwx9B6MearO6t5J7k=)** I know we can count on you. Thank you for your support,
—Mark \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Mark Kelly**
Date: Thu, Jun 24, 2021
Subject: AZ and NH: 2 of the most vulnerable seats Friends – I have an important ask to make ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. Next week, we’ll close the books on our biggest deadline yet. It’s our latest opportunity to show our opponents that this campaign is moving full speed ahead. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._ **Last month, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona against us. And in New Hampshire, the same dark-money super PAC unleashed a massive digital ad campaign against Maggie Hassan. National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to try to win back the Senate -- and New Hampshire and Arizona are their top targets.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of these attacks, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our goal of 50,000 contributions. That is why I'm asking for your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better...a team of people like you, who I know will always have our backs. **And if we can hit our 50,000 contribution goal, it’ll show National Republicans that we're ready to defend these seats. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **[I’m humbly asking if you will split a $5 donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's. Now some Republican-led states are working to limit that process.”_** **We won’t let radical politicians get away with this power grab.** **[Add your name to say you’re with us as we keep fighting to win real change at the ballot box →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31383959/292490727/-745034530?ms=em0624_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2ZjMzkyMy1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUV1HYy44a6EWcVwaVpNItf3O4Rkjd5Ns6ZyRZy44Hw=&emci=d5af413f-c8d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=37fc3923-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=561582)** Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiative campaigns in red, purple, and blue states to win real change when out-of-touch politicians refuse to act. **But now, these extremist politicians are attacking people-powered ballot initiatives.** As NBC News wrote just a few days ago: **_"After Idaho's Medicaid expansion received resounding support at the ballot box in 2018 along with funding for education, the Republican-controlled legislature began pushing to make future ballot initiatives more difficult."_** We helped voters in Idaho expand health care at the ballot box -- and now politicians there want to make it harder to win. They’re attacking democracy. _As our executive director Kelly Hall told NBC News, “That should terrify all of us.”_ **But we won’t sit back and let it happen. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT REGARDING DOJ'S LAWSUIT AGAINST S.B. 202
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, JUNE 25, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT REGARDING DOJ'S LAWSUIT AGAINST S.B. 202
ATLANTA - In response to the U.S. Department of Justice's decision to [file suit](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lZ1cS9MOgMdvD_q3lhpDtxnaeWCWdO7QA5Q9SeRfJHiNY5BL4YXOAuFwFaJYODh3zMJr7ZuoWa2bXsG5C2bBKqXODyF5l3jmUDzPDZ-zyrUCMKhsB5Yiss-9x_ByTjFnvys6e5n5VFTt17KJ4trjpwv16apnxWUhFD-4Lee0QXXiqnfdFufrsuoLQhfp-GfC3A-Dcyeoo_XiHrrZmDRygk-hlM8sp98aALNGR72tbC1iMzx6PBzp7A==&c=eDuLBHSKW0XKelU3YZ75szWIVBlcm-RAt81iheVx5TB-i25JyUxChQ==&ch=IvXjuKJtyiml1_dYIUXpIwfL9uQmDOAiYfl3s4iBjN7koMaO6inYng==) against the state of Georgia over the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202), Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler released the following statement:
"Greater Georgia will continue our fight to protect the Election Integrity Act, which expands voting access and secures our elections. We will deploy every necessary resource to help defend this legislation from liberal overreach in Washington D.C.," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler.
---
| ###

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: $3 is a small price to pay to give Pennsylvania working families the champion they deserve.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

From day one, I’ve been adamant that I wouldn't take a penny from corporate PACs, corporate lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry. And there’s a reason for that.
It’s because I’ve experienced first-hand how awful and terrifying it is to be sold out by a government meant to protect us.
I realize that we’ve sent a lot of messages recently, especially about our upcoming FEC deadline.
**But folks, I can’t stress this enough:_your support is critical to our work_ — because this campaign belongs to working people and families.**
[We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t absolutely necessary. Before Wednesday night, can you pitch in to keep our Senate blue? $3 is a small price to pay to give Pennsylvania working families the champion they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384813/292494523/-347207331?refcode2=9be815dd-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210625-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU4MTVkZC1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uB-Pbc5cxF7WZJqjSvlNVsedsFy0-HimiRg6sI9c4U8=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384814/292494524/-347207331?refcode2=9be815dd-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210625-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU4MTVkZC1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uB-Pbc5cxF7WZJqjSvlNVsedsFy0-HimiRg6sI9c4U8=)**
If you didn’t know, FEC deadlines are federally-mandated. And after they pass we must publish a public-facing report that shows how much our campaign has raised over a certain period of time.
Once our opponents get their hands on our report, they’re looking for one thing, and one thing only: If we have what it takes to beat them.
**It’s the most critical time of the year, and all eyes are on us.**
[So I’m personally asking again: Will you pitch in $3, or whatever you can afford at this time, to ensure that this movement pulls through?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384815/292494525/-347207331?refcode2=9be815dd-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210625-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU4MTVkZC1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uB-Pbc5cxF7WZJqjSvlNVsedsFy0-HimiRg6sI9c4U8=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384816/292494526/-347207331?refcode2=9be815dd-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210625-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmU4MTVkZC1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uB-Pbc5cxF7WZJqjSvlNVsedsFy0-HimiRg6sI9c4U8=)**

Malcolm

name: John McGuigan
subject: [Add your name] A better option than slowly killing our planet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
|
---
| | Peter, This isn't complicated. **Either we're passing policies – like putting an immediate end to fracking – that are going to protect our oceans and coastal communities... or we're going to bury ourselves nice and deep in the pockets of an industry that's slowly killing our planet.** Which is it going to be? Because, like I said on World Ocean Day, this is far, far from just a Pennsylvania problem. **[Please sign the petition and urge Congress to take immediate action to protect our oceans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384849/292494809/1746273527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=&emci=0e933474-3cd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)** _John_ [add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384852/292494815/1746273527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=&emci=0e933474-3cd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356) Forwarded Message [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384856/292494819/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=&emci=0e933474-3cd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356) Today is World Ocean Day, Peter. So let's talk about fracking. Yes, fracking: the poisonous, destructive process of pulling natural gas out of inland bedrock. Fracking doesn't just poison groundwater and set off earthquakes. It also leads to the creation of dangerous plastics that end up – you guessed it – in the ocean. That means everything from:
* microplastics, tiny beads that sea creatures consume and that eventually end up in our bodies for decades, to
* the Great Pacific Garbage Patch, a massive island of garbage in the north Pacific that's nearly double the size of Texas and triple the size of France, to
* the _millions of pounds _of fishing gear (that surprised me, too) abandoned in the ocean each year, and more.

Our ocean is our greatest asset in the fight against climate change, Peter, pulling a massive amount of heat and carbon out of the atmosphere each year. But thanks to our nation's addiction to oil, plastic, and yes, fracking, we're not only destroying the climate, but destroying our best tool to save it. Today, on World Ocean Day, I'm asking our movement not just to reduce, reuse, and recycle, but to **_remove _politicians who won't pledge to oppose all fracking efforts.** The cycle of environmental destruction has gone on too long, Peter. It never should have started. We're here to end it. _John_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384861/292494824/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=pet-2021-06-oceans-email&refcode2=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384865/292494829/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=pet-2021-06-oceans-email&refcode2=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384871/292494833/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=pet-2021-06-oceans-email&refcode2=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31384875/292494845/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=pet-2021-06-oceans-email&refcode2=f9025eea-ced5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAyNWVlYS1jZWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsUP80YRFSpDYKk2P3AyYx--QiQAWbb1R4jRKL95rOI=)

name: MondaireForCongress.com
subject: We’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
If our fundraising isn’t up to snuff, that signals to anyone considering challenging us that this movement is beatable.
#

Hey there, this is Hannah — Mondaire’s Campaign Manager.
Our team is so grateful for your continued support, but I’m **reaching out today to ask if you could take your support to the next level and make an online campaign contribution ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline next Wednesday.**
If you’re ready to make that contribution, here’s a link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-june-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31385940/292499588/-254107743?refcode2=741f69b3-d0d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210625-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDFmNjliMy1kMGQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tyUvlwRxGLgVkWn2N7KxGCY5RywGZQ_fGbDKnwUMO5M=)**
The end of each quarter is one of the most critical times for campaign fundraising, because every three months, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised.
Every campaign has to do this, so when we release our numbers, we’re compared head-to-head with other members of Congress running for re-election and anyone running against us.
At this point in the campaign cycle, we can expect challengers from any party to jump in the race and try to unseat Mondaire. Last cycle, we beat 7 primary opponents, including a billionaire and other much better-funded candidates.
**If our fundraising isn’t up to snuff, that signals to anyone considering challenging us that this movement is beatable. That’s why it’s critically important that we post the strongest fundraising numbers possible each quarter — especially now.**

Our team is so grateful for your continued support, but I’m reaching out today to ask if you could take your support to the next level and make an online campaign contribution ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline next Wednesday. If you’re ready to make that contribution, here’s a link to give: = The end of each quarter is one of the most critical times for campaign fundraising, because every three months, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised. Every campaign has to do this, so when we release our numbers, we’re compared head-to-head with other members of Congress running for re-election and anyone running against us. At this point in the campaign cycle, we can expect challengers from any party to jump in the race and try to unseat Mondaire. Last cycle, we beat 7 primary opponents, including a billionaire and other much better-funded candidates. If our fundraising isn’t up to snuff, that signals to anyone considering challenging us that this movement is beatable. That’s why it’s critically important that we post the strongest fundraising numbers possible each quarter — especially now. = Thank you for taking the time to read this and for supporting Mondaire’s campaign. name: Ras Smith
subject: The Iowa I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can chip in a few bucks to support our campaign. But before I do, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why I’m running for governor. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31386712/292502267/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210625eoq1_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU0NThkOC1kMmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-8vYiE04Wao1kl5F5iwSWU3GmEE0hIYTRRYEvXFeN4=)
---
Team, In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can chip in a few bucks to support our campaign. But before I do, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why I’m running for governor. Growing up in Iowa, I saw a lot of folks leave the state once they graduated from high school. There are so many parents out there attending graduation ceremonies this month who know that their child is already planning to never call Iowa home again. We all know that something’s not right. Our state’s social contract with the people has been broken. Far too many Iowans are giving all that they have, day in and day out, just to barely survive. We need a governor who works just as hard to make life easier for current and future generations of Iowans. Despite our challenges, I have faith in who we are. Our history is marked by moments like this. Moments when Iowans have acted with courage, when we’ve led the way for our nation. As a state, our heritage is our path forward. Iowa desegregated schools before the federal government. We developed agriculture that feeds the world. We recognized that love is love before any other midwestern state. Just one year ago, Iowa was one of only three states to pass a law ensuring that a murder like that of George Floyd would not happen here when we passed the Plan for a More Perfect Union. **That’s the Iowa that I know.** And I know that if we come together, we can elect leaders who will truly represent us, not leave us high and dry. We can find solutions to our common struggles, to lift our communities up. We can make Iowa a place that any person would be proud to call home. I’m aiming to do that with each and every one of you as I run to become Iowa’s next governor. **Next week, our campaign is already facing its first major deadline since I announced my candidacy last week.** The amount we raise before then will go to show just how much energy and excitement is behind our campaign. **[So, can you chip in just $10 or whatever you can spare to help us put up strong grassroots fundraising numbers before the quarter ends? Let’s show how serious we are about coming together to make Iowa a better place for us all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31386713/292502269/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210625eoq1_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDU0NThkOC1kMmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-8vYiE04Wao1kl5F5iwSWU3GmEE0hIYTRRYEvXFeN4=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Nancy Pelosi for Congress
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | **FIRST:** Kevin McCarthy jetted to Mar-A-Lago to meet with Trump. **THEN:** Republicans funneled Trump $175,000.

body:
Hey Peter, we want to give you an inside look at what your donations do for a grassroots campaign like ours.

**Running a people-powered campaign isn't cheap.** We aren't taking a dime from corporate PACs, which means we rely on grassroots dollars to help us grow our movement, invest in online ads, run our email program, and even chip in for gas so Sarah can travel across Wisconsin to meet folks where they’re at.

All of that costs money and that's why hitting every single one of our fundraising goals is so important. When we fall short of the goals we set, we have to start thinking about making budget cuts -- now, luckily, we haven’t reached that point yet but we’ve got to stay on track to make sure we don’t slip up.

The money we raise today will help spread Sarah's vision for Wisconsin's future across the state -- and it helps us get one step closer to defeating Ron Johnson and expanding the Democratic Senate majority. But our work requires your support and your investment (no matter how small!) every step of the way.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, Peter, you 're one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

Peter, 245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

Peter, Donald Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress _OR_[**you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to join an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. There are millions of other Trump Patriots who would happily join the 1776 Donor Club. We chose YOU! [**Answer the call**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57807852:JOQ2vHlNJ:m:1:3253819041:822C436BAD0BE310680993D3418F18DF:r) or we will have to select the next conservative on our list...

**The upcoming election is perhaps the most uncertain one we have seen in years.**
Not only will we be facing a midterm after electing a Democratic president (which, historically, means the party in power _loses_ seats in Congress), but new district lines nationwide mean we could face a much more competitive election year.
Republicans are going to be relying on their **dark money and deep-pocketed friends** to give them the edge they need to not only take back Congress, but throw the brakes on everything we have been trying to accomplish.
**[That is why it is so urgent we get a head start. So far, we are at 1140 donations in 2021. Will you chip in and help us break our goal of 1200 grassroots donations by June 30?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31387392/292504753/1596212816?refcode=2021-06-25-eoq2&recurring=0&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a031c11b-d5d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMxYzExYi1kNWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MocKTNSKCk93HBmaEGR4DqvAb2-BlQtWmxjUYImiHN8=)**
In spite of our historic organizing efforts in 2020, Democrats still lost a few seats in the House. While we still have the majority, Republicans took one step toward taking back the chamber.
**If Republicans win just five more seats in 2022, it would be a disaster for our priorities.**
We cannot let that happen.
**[Please make a donation of $16 today, as we stand together to defend and expand our Democratic majority in Congress in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31387393/292504754/1596212816?refcode=2021-06-25-eoq2&recurring=0&amount=16&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a031c11b-d5d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMxYzExYi1kNWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MocKTNSKCk93HBmaEGR4DqvAb2-BlQtWmxjUYImiHN8=)**

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Are you ready to fight?
body:
Since launching our campaign, I've learned why the left resorts to cancel culture and censorship to win their fights.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSNE0mcfXSnA6_-ANQ504sP5V2N-zrH0_QnPyCQGtrEVBnKGAyz4uCgwqwOktL9-dcS7uMyIOSboKBRztOunn-pzezZPNhm3iaIdwH-akXb3WN-G5pjISPnw9yZSAMtZlA5JwbdO7vsJtPBkgGPYPEpd28_kvYnRLBM3QT0QYysBy9dCLtm1fw==&c=msJSmuGL9Sd6fimuFK_golfqmc8O6MeaPP3jjSLtvCuuOHJj3ILvqw==&ch=TBEZGJqXRiRhmI0LQHOWnJW5ZkZ7rttmP5-DOa1bkmCegaNrK97EqA==)
---
| Peter,
Since launching our campaign, I have been overwhelmed by the amount of support we have received from so many generous patriots in Ohio and across the country.
It means so much to me to have earned your support.
You and I launched this campaign to defeat the radical left, cancel culture, and the rise of socialism.
I'm a businessman. I'm not a politician. I'm blunt, plain-spoken, and I tell it like it is. So here's the truth: I believe that America is the greatest country in the history of the world and our best days are ahead of us... but we must stand up to cancel culture, Nancy Pelosi and her cronies, and the radical left. Peter, I am quickly approaching our campaign's first FEC Campaign Finance Reporting deadline on June 30th. This is one of the most IMPORTANT filings I will submit to the FEC. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Ban Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)
body:
Join Me

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=aaf289c2c2d54c4b99703dff0cf3e303&_e=2hG938khnhVd_5OEApSN7Atra35nZcnfzgHofqfN_f11ikGe11NPgrj4QlsmX_yCHJ_Kzu5kS_tH5_i1XV0OsqCSlVIbitMdmjmmKj0W0PHALN1U7yjslNn2nPaXkYNOTZzzzsv74lIL1bJ4qPFlKmKIZo1-v3deHqG0X-gxigy6cweqp91XVIeVsfYc4bEEdRAa6pgDWp_huVt5wUuPmWVL3YL1_irIZBL8ixr8U9_dTkRo0glI1dNdIEV9TaRkL9aC5fuIRODqf9kXqPINZhHFkWJzsIwCIAeeJ84MZcWuuMZ9tP9o_FBdHuz0Ec0GMaraHwvf64yFSmKAJA5ryewNLhlTE1zM_2RI9zxn0oWUC8mutp3sQ-CAxpgH8s-4xuGDfli9WksrX5vJMbiU84ezajZlYtAO0m9h1qDc6LtE8GSGyN_5GMq0-j_eGIYRqHyNK9Jd9CZ-oza6Sfqo2xXxFSoJ-c7DbX9A-xi-mgw%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot,

**[If you haven't heard, Critical Race Theory is an anti-American belief that teaches that racism is present in every interaction and that America has never and can never move forward.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=aaf289c2c2d54c4b99703dff0cf3e303&_e=2hG938khnhVd_5OEApSN7Atra35nZcnfzgHofqfN_f11ikGe11NPgrj4QlsmX_yCHJ_Kzu5kS_tH5_i1XV0OsqCSlVIbitMdmjmmKj0W0PHALN1U7yjslNn2nPaXkYNOTZzzzsv74lIL1bJ4qPFlKmKIZo1-v3deHqG0X-gxigy6cweqp91XVIeVsfYc4bEEdRAa6pgDWp_huVt5wUuPmWVL3YL1_irIZBL8ixr8U9_dTkRo0glI1dNdIEV9TaRkL9aC5fuIRODqf9kXqPINZtVNa577vJbxTRnpVEDu85VwLfxGxEor6KbdFD8o9OgLiEyexntwDIR96YoZwgWY3h948BPDYlCK0PL-qF7AOYZyzq1lnNdVQhLTHguXd3IIEgZ3fGoaAgh6QNbMS7_KIBtzLVYNmnjaa_MC_XmEe4dP8FuLRVe9QUTDcnpZQux34Qqg9G2fY7IO53dleX7d3J5X9fqsFvgiVKK7Fs53SIw%3D)**

It’s a dangerous school of thought that erodes the very foundations of American democracy and society, and I think it’s **WRONG**.

I’m not afraid to say that it’s **CRAZY** that this idea is being taught in our schools and colleges, and it's now official United States government policy.

**I'm fighting back against this ridiculous and offensive ideology in our schools and in our government.**

clean_body: People are starting to recognize hypocrisy as par for the course in this administration. | Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. Believe me when I tell you that I know President Trump. No one has fought harder to defend America from the Radical Left. So when Sleepy Joe Biden decided to take credit for President Trump’s Operation Warp Speed vaccine program, I wasn’t surprised. It was just another lie from the Left. | | Joe Biden spent the whole campaign undermining the public’s trust in President Trump and Operation Warp Speed. But as soon as the election ended, he tried to take credit for everything President Trump achieved! | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Tackling student debt
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Our younger generations represent the future of our state -- yet, they are forced to shoulder the increasing costs of higher education. For thousands of Marylanders, student loan debt is a crushing burden that casts a long shadow over the rest of their lives, making it more difficult to buy a house, start a family, and enjoy the same standard of living shared by prior generations.
We need effective and lasting solutions to solve the student debt crisis.
I’m building a grassroots, people-powered movement, and I want to hear directly from you about this issue. Will you take our quick survey to tell us about how you or your family has been impacted by student debt? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KcTvnISpF0ObaVUg4_rcMg2]
To ensure Maryland leads the way on this pressing issue and becomes a go-to state for young people, we’re crafting a pilot program that will forgive student debt for college and vocational graduates who move to Maryland -- or stay in Maryland -- if they live, work, and pay taxes in the state for 5 years after graduation.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/KcTvnISpF0ObaVUg4_rcMg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KcTvnISpF0ObaVUg4_rcMg2]If you have been directly impacted by student debt, then I would like to hear your story. Whether you're an older graduate who took out loans years ago, a younger student about to enter college and anxious about your future, a parent of those students who is worried about supporting your family, or a teacher or professor within the education system, this is an issue that affects all of us. Your voices on this issue matters.
Click here to tell me about your experience with student loan debt. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/KcTvnISpF0ObaVUg4_rcMg2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em062521]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d1e20690-6fd3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/cc37df2e-dfd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzM3ZGYyZS1kZmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tELHzf3Wwcc5w_QuT9rqVp2cdto8caaTg6OzJsdjFzg=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Mike Collier
subject: TLDR: Bills only pass if Dan Patrick says so.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Quick explanation for you, team — When I talk to Texans across the state about the issues that matter most, folks are always asking our team one question: _What the heck does the lieutenant governor do?_ It’s a fair question. It’s a position that doesn't get nearly as many headlines as the governor — but one that observers say is the most powerful role in our state government. That’s because the lieutenant governor presides over the Texas Senate, meaning they have the power to appoint senators to committees and decide which bills make it to the floor for discussion, and then for a final vote. They also have significant control over the state’s budgeting process and spending priorities. **TL;DR: Bills only pass if Dan Patrick says so. If the Lt. Governor does not want a bill to pass, then it’s dead on arrival.** By replacing Dan Patrick, we can completely change the way our state does business. That’s why it’s so important we have the resources to take on Dan Patrick and hold him accountable for his failed leadership. **If we build a strong, diverse movement of Texans all across the state, we can fight back and win. name: Team Elaine
subject: Under pressure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31392662/292523505/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGUwNDY0NS1lMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nIdxGHsu4lLOXQDsw-SzlKK9oqIAasZsiVrWMDBsd5Q=)

| | Folks, Our campaign is in a difficult position. Right after the Cook Political Report released a report rating VA-02 as an R+1 district, the powerful Koch-funded conservative group Americans for Prosperity announced that they’re planning a potential attack campaign against Elaine with no limits on its budget. name: John Fetterman
subject: Peter, it would be my *honor* to vote for ALL of this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here are just some of the big things I'd be a guaranteed YES on if elected to the U.S. Senate:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210625-1831-header&t=1&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)
There's something important you should know about me + our race to flip this Senate seat blue in 2022.
| **John Fetterman** @johnfetterman
---|---
| | | I would always be that 51st vote. That’s the tweet.
---
Here's what I mean, Peter: Right now, Democrats have a razor-thin majority. If elected to the Senate, I will *always* be the deciding vote that Democrats can count on to get bold, common-sense legislation passed so that we can actually deliver on our promises to working people.
**Here are just some of the big things I'd be a guaranteed YES on if elected to the U.S. Senate:**
✊ Protecting the union way of life by passing the PRO Act
💵 Raising the national minimum wage to at least $15 an hour
🥦 Legalizing weed nationally + expunging all marijuana records + releasing all those incarcerated for using the plant
🌈 Expanding LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms through the Equality Act
🏛 Defending reproductive rights enshrined under _Roe v. Wade_
❌ Abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster
🗳 Passing the For the People Act
✔️ And SO much more. That was the floor — not the ceiling.
If that sounds like a senator that you'd get on board with, I'm asking you to do something important for our campaign ahead of next Wednesday's giant Q2 deadline: [**Will you chip in your first-ever $5 to our campaign to help flip this seat? Winning PA in 2022 is the crucial first step towards getting alllll of those important priorities passed.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210625-1831&t=2&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210625-1831&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)**
Peter, no voter owes their allegiance to any one political party. And I think that it's past time for Democrats in Congress to walk the walk when it comes to getting things done.
**We should be out there earning those votes by delivering meaningful progress every day.** I'm talking about real, tangible ways of making life better for working folks. That's the entire reason I got into public service nearly two decades ago as Mayor of Braddock, and it's why I'm running today to flip this Senate seat.
[**So, if you can, will you donate your first $5 to our campaign if you're on board with our fight to flip this seat and save our democracy? We're now just five days away from our important Q2 deadline, so anything helps!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210625-1831&t=22&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)
Yinz are the best. Truly. More from me soon, but in the meantime, thank you SO much for the support.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I've said this before, but I'll keep saying it louder for our pals in the back: _I think Democrats should vote like Democrats._ Especially in this 50-50 Senate. It would be my *honor* to be that deciding vote in the Senate for our bold, common-sense priorities, Peter, but I need your help to get there. [**Can you throw a few bucks our way? Thanks in advance.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20260?refcode=em20210625-1831&t=23&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210625-1831-footer&t=24&refcode2=1831_434096__xqjuG&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1831%2E434096%2E_xqjuG)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Tom Nelson
subject: we’re here to deliver for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friend,

**Let me level with you** : We have multiple candidates already in the Democratic primary. Right now, our message as the best candidate to take on Ron Johnson is at risk of being drowned out.

This isn’t because our message isn’t effective, or because we don’t have a message that is supported by most hard-working Wisconsinites. _Remember this poll?_ ↓↓↓

| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=fc33a88564&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Any Republican connected with attacking President Trump, and the America First movement, MUST be held accountable. That goes double in the Senate, the last bulwark against the Dems' Communism.**

Sen. Bill Cassidy (RINO-LA) is one of these worthless Leftist Republicans we must get rid of.

He made news for defending and supporting Trump-hating Liz Cheney, LAST MONTH:

_Cassidy’s declaration follows the Louisiana Republican arguing in a Sunday interview with NBC’s Meet the Press that if the GOP wants to win in 2022 and 2024, the party must agree with Cheney’s view that former President Donald Trump lost the 2020 presidential election to President Joe Biden.

“If you look at polls, there’s a whole group of folks that agree with Liz Cheney. And so, for us to win in 2022 and 2024, we need everybody. We need those who feel as Liz, those who feel as Lindsey. Ultimately it’s about the policies. You see that Cheney, Cassidy, support those policies. Those policies are a ticket to victory. Those policies bring us back in 2022,” Cassidy told host Chuck Todd._

This guy is totally clueless. He's one of the "7 Romneys" who voted to convict President Trump in the U.S. Senate. Then he goes on far-Left extremist MSNBC to bash Republicans and attack Trump- and to support Trump-hating Liz Cheney.

Seriously, this guy is a DEMOCRAT in disguise. He acts like the "LA" that comes after his name stands for Los Angeles, not Louisiana!

subject: The Defeat of HR1/S1 (For Now)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Good news Hoosier Republicans: the Democrat election hijacking bill, HR1/S1 is dead. For now at least. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470610?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**The Defeat of HR1/S1 (For Now)**_ Good news Hoosier Republicans: the Democrat election hijacking bill, HR1/S1 is dead. For now at least. The Orwellian titled “For the People Act” was nothing short of an attempted takeover of our elections. The bill would have allowed partisan ballot harvesting, threatened election security by weakening common-sense voter ID laws, paved the way for DC statehood, mandated taxpayer funded political campaigns, stuffed voter rolls with unverified registrations, and would have expanded flawed and insecure vote-by-mail systems where ballots are mailed to voters regardless of it the ballot was requested or not. Our thanks to Senators Young and Braun for holding strong in the Senate and to our GOP delegation in the House for always fighting to protect our elections.

Of course, while the defeat is welcome, we all know that it isn’t necessarily over. Anyone who’s seen Nightmare on Elm Street or Friday the 13th knows that even when the monster dies, it isn’t truly dead. In fact, we know Washington Democrats are already plotting ways to sneak these dangerous provisions into other bills. We’ll remain vigilant and keep you informed on ways to protect the security and integrity of our elections systems.

Thanks Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer meets with State Sen. Brian Buchanan, State Rep. Doug Gutwein and Jasper County GOP Chairman Jeff Phillips earlier this week in Demotte. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Moving Indiana Forward_** **Governor Holcomb** joined Senator Todd Young in Fishers to discuss the Endless Frontier Act. The passing of this bi-partisan legislation will help Indiana invest into areas such as technology innovation and manufacturing - encouraging an independent and efficient economy.

On Wednesday, **Governor Holcomb **visited the National Confectioners Association kickoff. This organization brings together confectioners, chocolatiers and candy-makers to promote innovation in the making of sweet treats.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb and Senator Todd Young come together to discuss the positive impact the Endless Frontier Act will have on Indiana.

**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb posing with the Keebler Elf at the National Confectioners Association Kickoff. _

|
---
|

| _**RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Launches "Real America" Podcast**_ RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel launched her new podcast, “Real America.” and will be traveling the country sharing stories from outside the beltway, highlighting Republican leaders around the country and how Republican policies have improved Americans’ lives. Chairwoman McDaniel is offering the platform for Republican leaders to share their successes and for listeners to hear real stories from the exciting, leading voices in our Party.
_**“America is an amazing country filled with wonderful people who do incredible things, but too often the media and liberal politicians ignore big parts of our nation and the people who make it work. So I'm thrilled to speak with these amazing leaders and policymakers in our party who solve real problems every day, and help spread their message far and wide.” -Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel**_
Chairwoman McDaniel's Podcast is available on Spotify, Appple Podcasts, or wherever podcasts are available. [Click here to listen](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34acd25b65&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[celebrates Juneteenth and shares its importance](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9e65ea184a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[fights to make the Hyde Amendment permanent ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=420e04a3a9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [congratulates Thomas Goffe on receiving the Legion of Honor](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=06149d2bc2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [speaks with members of Colonial Hills Baptist Church](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d7e51e4c6b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [visits the Dearborn County fair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26e6d58b6d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Good news Hoosier Republicans: the Democrat election hijacking bill, HR1/S1 is dead. For now at least. | | | | | | | | The Defeat of HR1/S1 (For Now) Good news Hoosier Republicans: the Democrat election hijacking bill, HR1/S1 is dead. For now at least. The Orwellian titled “For the People Act” was nothing short of an attempted takeover of our elections. The bill would have allowed partisan ballot harvesting, threatened election security by weakening common-sense voter ID laws, paved the way for DC statehood, mandated taxpayer funded political campaigns, stuffed voter rolls with unverified registrations, and would have expanded flawed and insecure vote-by-mail systems where ballots are mailed to voters regardless of it the ballot was requested or not. Our thanks to Senators Young and Braun for holding strong in the Senate and to our GOP delegation in the House for always fighting to protect our elections. Of course, while the defeat is welcome, we all know that it isn’t necessarily over. Anyone who’s seen Nightmare on Elm Street or Friday the 13th knows that even when the monster dies, it isn’t truly dead. In fact, we know Washington Democrats are already plotting ways to sneak these dangerous provisions into other bills. We’ll remain vigilant and keep you informed on ways to protect the security and integrity of our elections systems. Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer meets with State Sen. Brian Buchanan, State Rep. Doug Gutwein and Jasper County GOP Chairman Jeff Phillips earlier this week in Demotte. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Moving Indiana Forward Governor Holcomb joined Senator Todd Young in Fishers to discuss the Endless Frontier Act. The passing of this bi-partisan legislation will help Indiana invest into areas such as technology innovation and manufacturing - encouraging an independent and efficient economy. On Wednesday, Governor Holcomb visited the National Confectioners Association kickoff. This organization brings together confectioners, chocolatiers and candy-makers to promote innovation in the making of sweet treats. Photo: Governor Holcomb and Senator Todd Young come together to discuss the positive impact the Endless Frontier Act will have on Indiana. Photo: Governor Holcomb posing with the Keebler Elf at the National Confectioners Association Kickoff. | | | RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Launches "Real America" Podcast RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel launched her new podcast, “Real America.” and will be traveling the country sharing stories from outside the beltway, highlighting Republican leaders around the country and how Republican policies have improved Americans’ lives. Chairwoman McDaniel is offering the platform for Republican leaders to share their successes and for listeners to hear real stories from the exciting, leading voices in our Party. “America is an amazing country filled with wonderful people who do incredible things, but too often the media and liberal politicians ignore big parts of our nation and the people who make it work. So I'm thrilled to speak with these amazing leaders and policymakers in our party who solve real problems every day, and help spread their message far and wide.” -Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman McDaniel's Podcast is available on Spotify, Appple Podcasts, or wherever podcasts are available. . | | | Chairman Hupfer on the Road Chairman Hupfer was on the road often this week. Visiting Hoosier Republicans in Lake and Jasper Counties and delivering the keynote at the Clinton County Lincoln Day Dinner. Here are some pictures from the week. | | | Photos: Chairman Hupfer speaks before the Jasper County GOP golf outing tees off. | | Photo: Chairman Hupfer visits with 1st District Chair Mike Simpson. | | Photo: Chairman Hupfer delivers the keynote at the Clinton County Lincoln Day Dinner. | | Photo: Chairman Hupfer with Clinton County Chairman Jim Moyer and outgoing Vice Chair Linda Brammell. Kyle presented Linda with a Chairman’s Award for her years of service and support to the party. | | | Rep. Walorski and Governor Holcomb Discuss Grissom ARB Representative Walorski and Governor Holcomb met with USAF Lt. Gen. Richard Scobee to discuss the advantages Grissom ARB would provide as a base for the KC-46A Pegasus aircraft. We are confident in Grissom ARB's ability to host these new aerial refueling and transport aircraft. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner : 2021 Young Republican National Convention : Parke County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Marco Lopez
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31396196/292534554/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM0ZjVjMS1lYmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twabgJFYwRHpgxIQtoU4kzjti_72ZtlZm71UADO6l50=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to become one of the 500 Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents taught me that _la promesa_ of Arizona is that if you work hard and dream big, anything is possible.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to live that promise – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others. From being elected mayor of my hometown to serving in the Obama administration, I've always sought to bring people together to solve big problems.
But with the failed leadership of Republicans like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey – politicians who would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state – that promise is no longer being met. **I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you're ready for a change, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become a Founding Donor of our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31396199/292534555/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM0ZjVjMS1lYmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twabgJFYwRHpgxIQtoU4kzjti_72ZtlZm71UADO6l50=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31396200/292534556/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM0ZjVjMS1lYmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twabgJFYwRHpgxIQtoU4kzjti_72ZtlZm71UADO6l50=)
Becoming a Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that _still_ has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up – _and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical midnight deadline – to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31396201/292534558/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM0ZjVjMS1lYmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twabgJFYwRHpgxIQtoU4kzjti_72ZtlZm71UADO6l50=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez

Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that still has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a toss-up – and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power. We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. So please, I'm counting on your support: = Thanks for joining me in this fight. Marco Lopez | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

clean_body: Please read the whole memo... Peter, I wanted to share with you our recentCAMPAIGN STRATEGY MEMO for the campaign that highlights where we stand right now. The below memo contains important strategic information about our next steps, so please, do not share or forward this correspondence. FOR TEAM SARAH EYES ONLY If you can, please read the whole memo. It’s that important. Once you’re finished, I think it will be clear why we need your support NOW, and I hope you will to help us fight back and win this race. TO: FROM: Chris Caldwell, Sarah For Governor Campaign Manager RE: "The Plan: Defeat Sarah Huckabee Sanders" DATE: 06.25.21 ________________________ STATE OF PLAY Recently, a far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer's allies launched over $100,000 in attack ads against Sarah. They think they can buy Arkansas votes with negative lies. We're going to prove THEY'RE WRONG. Before our End-Of-Quarter deadline , we're launching a campaign to defend Sarah and asking every supporter to contribute towards our $100,000 goal to FIGHT BACK. The deadline for the DEFEND SARAH FUND is on June 30th at 11:59PM and we cannot afford to come up short. That's why I'm relying on every member of Team Sarah to do our part so we can counter the far-left messaging on TV, on social media, and on the ground where it counts. Moving forward, it's imperative that our goals meet or exceed the radical, left-wing money flooding into this race. We need this $100,000 to compete - and we need it in the next 5 days. Peter, as you can see, our End-Of-Quarter efforts are essential to our future success. Can you make an immediate donation to our End-Of-Quarter DEFEND SARAH FUND now? subject: I need Kim fighting alongside me in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Since flipping Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018, Dr. Kim Schrier has been an invaluable leader in the House. She's helped our House Democratic Majority make real progress -- including passing legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, provide COVID-19 relief, and so much more. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31397498/292540507/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjA5NzdmMi1lZmQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXk5fzHKYt7tm1FuG6TNX6n43PUDe_ut8oe6fAzahe8=&emci=89f79e36-30d4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=520977f2-efd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Since flipping Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018, Dr. Kim Schrier has been an invaluable leader in the House. She's helped our House Democratic Majority make real progress -- including passing legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, provide COVID-19 relief, and so much more.

But Republicans are only five seats away from retaking the Majority next year, and they've named Kim's seat a top target to help them do it. A GOP dark money group has already launched TV ads attacking Kim and it's only a matter of time before more attacks come her way.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: the Republican recall >>
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friend —

As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in
California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and
anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

They pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and
across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight
for a cleaner planet, immigration reform, or election security.

So I need your help today.
Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall
are going to set their sights on our campaign as well.

I plan on doing everything I can to hold this seat, but any amount of help
you can give would go a long way. And that’s why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots
campaign before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end?
We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we
receive in June sends a powerful message that we will not back down
without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210625-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]Other amount

It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for
everything you do — it means so much to me to be alongside you in this
fight.

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210625-1-15&t=1020&refcode2=112_159979__Bjtpx&akid=112%2E159979%2E_Bjtpx ]DONATE NOW

The midterm elections aren’t until next November -- but that hasn’t stopped the National Republican Senatorial Committee from already launching nasty attack ads against Democratic Senators, including Raphael Warnock in Georgia and Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.
#
Peter,
The midterm elections aren’t until next November -- but that hasn’t stopped the National Republican Senatorial Committee from already launching nasty attack ads against Democratic Senators, including Raphael Warnock in Georgia and Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.
And after Republicans filibustered the For the People Act this week, the stakes are even higher. _It’s clear that the Senate GOP can’t be trusted to protect voting rights or our democracy._ We simply can’t afford to lose a single seat in 2022 -- and we need to fight hard to keep our majority.
**[Will you help Democrats fight back against the GOP’s attacks? Rush in a $1 donation to support our Senate champions Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Patty Murray.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31398089/292543559/1189865591?refcode=pm_em_210625_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzRhMzQyYy1mMWQ1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QL6z6Lwdl-a08TtxNnxORzIsGjaKUF3Eg7Nal8N0SM=)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Tick season is critically worse this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ux%2BiCsyyPD7xBRE8CkSyh079dNhVUMSE&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Although it was decades ago, I can still remember the long summer days here in Connecticut, our kids playing outside for hours. When it was time to come inside, my wife and I _always_ made sure to check for ticks. Being careful to prevent Lyme disease is even more important now - this year's crop of ticks is worse than it's ever been.
While Connecticut has long been an epicenter of this critical public health issue, ticks are being found just about everywhere nowadays - in city parks of large urban areas, beaches of northern coastal communities, anywhere that's warm - and their spread has intensified with the climate crisis.
The people of Connecticut know just how serious and debilitating the symptoms of Lyme disease can be - and that it's going to take more than tucking in our socks and checking for tick bites to solve the problem. **That 's why I'm calling on Congress to fund research for prevention and treatment of Lyme disease.**
**[With tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease on the rise, will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to help stop Lyme disease?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease-0621?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1039-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1039-su-nd)**
The outbreaks of ticks in Connecticut and across the country pose a serious health risk - and I encourage you to take extra precautions as we enter the summer season, Friend.
But sadly, tick-borne diseases are becoming more prevalent. Lyme disease must be a research priority and, just like other debilitating diseases, needs Congressional focus and support. **I need you to help me voice urgent concern right now.**
**[I need 1,000 signatures before midnight tonight, so please sign my petition urging Congress to help stop the spread of Lyme disease.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease-0621?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1039-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0621%3Fcode%3Djtk1039-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick

name: Chairman Stephen Stepanek
subject: Promises made, Promises Kept - NH Legislature Passes Historic Budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
On Thursday we passed a historic budget which will cut taxes, end abortion after 24 weeks, and establish Education Freedom Accounts
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/1/0100017a43f84236-aaf189d4-1456-4c31-9186-8ce1c3edbb4e-000000/nLiyfncyUgCNrvGga0EzF9ZkiiQ=224)
Derek,
I am very happy to inform you that on Thursday the New Hampshire State Senate and House of Representatives, led by Republicans, passed a historic budget.
When you voted for Republicans in the 2020 election, it came with the promise that we would we would fight for conservative values, and bring your voice to Concord. I am proud to say that _we have delivered on that promise_.
The 2021-22 budget is a significant step towards _reducing taxes and spending_ , providing New Hampshire children and families with the _best possible education_ , and ensuring that the future of our State is a secure and prosperous one.

Some of the most significant points of the budget include:
* Cutting statewide Property Taxes by $100,000,000
* Establishing Education Freedom Accounts, bringing school choice to New Hampshire families
* Phasing out the interest and dividends tax
* Barring Critical Race Theory from being taught in public schools
* Banning unnecessary and inhumane late-term abortions
* Funding the New Hampshire Rainy-Day fund to the highest level ever

We will continue to fight for you, and bring conservative values to our state. Thanks to your support we were able to make significant progress towards a more free, safe, and prosperous New Hampshire. With your help I am confident that we will continue to do so long into the future.
In order to continue our fight against the radical Left, we need your support. Over the past year, 9 _7% of your donations have gone directly towards electing Republicans_. We fight each and every day to ensure that your voice is represented in Concord. Can you make a contribution today, to ensure that our success continues into 2022?
\- Chairman Stephen Stepanek

[Can you contribute today to support our fight for Conservative Values in New Hampshire?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Fdonate/2/0100017a43f84236-aaf189d4-1456-4c31-9186-8ce1c3edbb4e-000000/hQqZ-k5haSBqNsC4Ix0VqrXINJg=224)

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Not the news we were hoping to share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share.
There are just **5 days** to go until our big June FEC fundraising deadline and we still have some work to do to reach our 100,000 contribution goal.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this but we are facing two big problems. First, two new Republican candidates announced this month that they are running against Mark in 2022 — that brings us to three opponents total now. And second, _The Hill_ and _CNN_ have named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spot an opening and continue to attack our campaign.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $10 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=10&refcode=em210625-1-15?t=1&refcode2=859_6688874_GFc1SQ&akid=859%2E6688874%2EGFc1SQ)

Thank you for your support ahead of this month’s deadline. We simply can’t fund this people-powered campaign without you.
Team Kelly
