name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWyb3HxfDBTzcjEZoMi2mHhumDT75BgnXmiaoC6qKrvEOME6PwvQkP22o2qtXr5GT91pZdnOh-bJakbRI5HQYkYXrWDoZrjBaL0rTZhf-VdKh4AlJOW2q1Nox_GzQBQpQ-LHb9jNY6-TyqvFPSgiTDGxAp-wUY4mSpEVhIzyIxrScUm_vUj-TGWSUS1q42a3xnHzlEC-0fzR8Ua6MiC5zNNCQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWyRmqDI7h7mnUxkRtajboMf_y6g0B4P1c7T00Y_oolYLcdXZZ3qXu1bcQTeVQlYWaCboo8vt5qM2rBAQLmp74zu7Kk2LB-rQLp2YtlZOcp9Kn3d8WWK7AsVQREjgtov5Hs9sCTazQPLpdDYaw5gni9aZMzqWaJ6prnkQGH5apTN-I_aLGNIGNBx7IH-S0IVA9U8VSagFSWSslfAE9oFxQuLA%3D%3D) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds.
When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled!
**Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player.
Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat.
Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.”
PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words:
“...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...”
**[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWygsALxlPoiGPZZT8y9ASYFUJvw3PgUFjPpE4pAGjPWszofdXvC7DZnYSZlMd8syeY-hecx5o_RyOZVS35q0p9isgFyMSyK2vl-85hI9Hl9_nPrLXgvn_oceAcfvoT5jb-8-bPN-mwHh6MWXLqNP8sxIz2vWwRjYJtOXqvvrTH7z7-Tqh1fAx-236rl4tz0Vfi8bwtJ98z0yBK4_GG7c_9KA%3D%3D)**
In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client.
Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America.
[**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWyyYeVboX9HallDjMBB7w8ShZmCH778XdMJb8I36YuMJy2zehiIPSL5xcxdfm0ss4sPyQgwfJ17cjIg4IHlV3xqtv-IbGahVif4ZJy3Cw7v9EmgtQU0SFoSxtQTfLyU4iACEZZ2h_eek6ceHDM8jIuxEhjvI0Ti4VUslGHt2thjyVRX7__-JpJga8aTcDIg6Qn7S6dIl0Q_pIfbgOY84_TRA%3D%3D)
What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWy_8axZWpU07jj6cwuE5mFUNOHeNcbmDRTHjPJTt-E9iE2epWH-JfMNln3hM4wVmcbyyyI9-YEsUB9kR55IIM1Y_vco8t0LfzlwbGZo6O91A7F9wzc4YntplsCeXyWOeSMBByRM7cRaRGT1bAApb6EBFXevL9yilD9Pnl8aHRfbygRo3gq7lgD-4xPdOiK2xaSCczNKmf7F-KKRcDU6cle5g%3D%3D) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.**
**[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWyD6TekTWuspoUZA4nyRxKE9YUc2PNIjpDaaP3rBYwBcHRWMNPFFEGPE6wCASNV4iKWPjmTylwIi9mP7dX-pkV9oDL8r7hcTpFL02gNTPJAVr7879P5nSlDOeJSeHh3es2kxYfr_OKG3jINpLAvOcpiJZqY-W9dddDndQrn97DuW4aV8uAAzDCXTPYnR6mJw1416LqhpV3Iagvd5D-KqnJpw%3D%3D)**
We cannot do this alone,
Your PragerU Team | |
---
**Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today.**
[Donate Now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96ddc917462d4b209ef1f6818905227b&_e=NNtNgAP-mOS5RC-5AWf9SPge05PV2dC0JNXW7MkHr-rXoevCr-JtJtXuEBS2NyFPuP8Ja89DZpvGJkwPA5R0DPAN0xI7-f98s9DGmqQ5PSeQzgfUSD4QVn-XcUBsxJWyXxZgEwveyzlp_3DVRGNW6vtnq0K5HuRvQ53539npiV48JFTIHvA2z4ChLREbP7JIPBNQKGYGX8dhbwfsvbpAWbRhI9rrbQCPArjoTyRSJIOR_LSPqklEqZMxkoBMNoSNOk7FoibKgRgeCAeLyqrdg3PbfHzl37sh-OTv7DovsUreOsOdmlfBjE4L7US5hoAbzBtTJQnOfvO48VFyvh0tfA%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?b?T+KAmUhhbGxlcmFu?= HQ
subject: Tom will always protect the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

Millions of Americans rely on the ACA for health care.

body:
**US House passes bill to support Puget Sound restoration, recovery

[The House passed Derek's bill to support local Puget Sound recovery efforts. Will you sign his petition to demand the Senate send this bill to President Biden's desk?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eyX7bUfKYybJXnm8QAXs3KLAsBEwIhDnkLQ6ZFdmvW0=/wdUkQSaWvU3AFKypoxoyYAVwe13JNy3-lmLvKtpCUm0=?gpsid=50_115_19510&ms=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/eyX7bUfKYybJXnm8QAXs3KLAsBEwIhDnkLQ6ZFdmvW0=/wdUkQSaWvU3AFKypoxoyYAVwe13JNy3-lmLvKtpCUm0=?gpsid=50_115_19510&ms=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---
| This is big news, Peter!

As co-chair of the Puget Sound Recovery Caucus, Derek is committed to restoring and conserving Puget Sound for future generations. That's just what his bill, The Promoting United Government Efforts to Save Our Sound (PUGET SOS) Act of 2021, would do.

Derek proudly co-sponsored this bill with Congresswoman Marilyn Strickland. The PUGET SOS Act of 2021 would provide millions of dollars in funding to restore the orca population, protect salmon, and uphold tribal treaty rights.

The passage of this bill in the House is a critical step toward ensuring future generations have access to Puget Sound's natural resources. Now we need the Senate to act too.

**[Will you sign Derek's petition to demand the Senate pass this critical environmental legislation without delay? Add your name today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/eyX7bUfKYybJXnm8QAXs3KLAsBEwIhDnkLQ6ZFdmvW0=/wdUkQSaWvU3AFKypoxoyYAVwe13JNy3-lmLvKtpCUm0=?gpsid=50_115_19510&ms=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/eyX7bUfKYybJXnm8QAXs3KLAsBEwIhDnkLQ6ZFdmvW0=/uXIPpY5Eco2Qh-ar9is865ZrxL796mTveOhKf27OWGI=?gpsid=50_115_19513&refcode=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210625_Puget_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

body:
The Recall Election is going to be here SOON, and we need your help to defeat Gavin Newsom! Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/15bd367189433f27c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, We have a CRITICAL deadline next week, and it’s more important than ever that everyone pitches in to help us reach our goal. It’s the end of our fundraising quarter — possibly the LAST ONE before the Recall Election. _The amount we are able to raise before midnight on June 30th will determine our voter outreach this summer. _ **[Please RUSH YOUR DONATION right now to help our grassroots team get out the vote this summer!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/32a95b8ebccfdf8ec3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Not only do we need to defeat Gavin Newsom, we need to elect Kevin Faulconer if we want a real California Comeback. He’s the only candidate in this race with the experience and actual plans necessary to turn things around, and make our state the land of Golden Opportunity once again. **Any donation amount helps, so please don’t wait to give. Even just $5 helps us fund critical campaign needs like yard signs, pamphlets, food and water for volunteers, the cost of sending texts, and more!** [**CHIP IN $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/470c0f5bd9fc7cd1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $10 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/25ff88bb699adc10c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/cb08b78dd94b3189c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/9f923368f643dd29c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/7b251c138f7ddd55c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Gavin Newsom has shown time and again that he does NOT care about the people of California. He only cares about his image, and how much wealth and power he can amass. It’s time for new leadership in California. It’s time to elect Kevin Faulconer, and get to work fixing our problems. With your help, we can make our state number one in the country once again as the best place on earth to live, work, and play. For our future,
Team Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/74fd8cfd661c9308c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/99f424a2fb2a60f6c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/0919322a39b4ff73c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f0e092806d33fe82/86572ff573b88916c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Karen Bass
subject: can I ask you a favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello,

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is in only five days, team. I'm reaching out to our top supporters (you!) to get a head start on our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal.

Already, national Republicans are flooding vulnerable districts across the country with outside spending. At the same time, GOP politicians at the state level are passing voter suppression laws left and right. And they're gerrymandering districts in their favor to try and take back the House.

**I 'll be honest -- if we plan to hang on to our vulnerable Democratic House majority, we can't miss this end-of-quarter goal.** The road to victory in 2022 starts now, and I'm asking:

**[To help us have a strong quarter, will you chip in now before the FEC deadline? Even $5 or $10 will help our team get closer to our goal, so please donate what you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/JZCGWPp2tRC8krtg9IGZBZTRkL18qpU7KUHklkZGl3s=/WSBNP9SM_xXR6Uzzcaqxw7sX5LSOjQ-q7ikSXeMlng8=?gpsid=39_132_19524&refcode=em21_210625_eoq1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210625_eoq1_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Our majority is hanging on by just five seats. But more importantly, our progressive movement for social and economic justice is on the line too.

If we want to keep fighting for affordable health care, an end to the housing crisis, student loan forgiveness, climate justice, and more -- protecting the House is vital. **I 'm leaning on this team more than ever before**, and it's why I'm sending you emails like this one.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Let's go |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e50bd66226&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative and a patriot leading the charge to hold Maricopa County elections supervisors accountable! I am on mission to restore election integrity in Arizona with real solutions not happy talk.

**While I am backed by one of the largest grassroots movement in a generation, it is absolutely critical that I am elected to Secretary of State where I will oversee the state’s elections and ensure that the travesty of the 2020 election never happens again!**

_But this all starts with you. And it starts TODAY._

We are up against an URGENT fundraising deadline by the end of the month where we have to reach our fundraising goal of $50,000.

**I need you to understand that if we do not reach our goal, it is not just THIS election, but ALL elections that are at stake.**
**_It is integrity on the ballot and it is the soul of America on the line._**

Will we become a FAKE Democracy like Russia where the Democrats just elect themselves into power every year while claiming freedom?

**Or will we actually fight back, make a stand, and not let the Democrats have their way with American Democracy?**

[_Donate TODAY to turn this country around. Let’s get back on track and save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=83eac276e9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=06aced2290&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Well, here you go.**

**CNN is blasting the Audit now.**

You know me. And you know my question has been the same.

_If there was nothing to hide in the 2020 election in Arizona, what are you afraid of?_

**_You should be celebrating the audit to vindicate your “success!”_**

But we all know that that’s not true.

_That’s just not how reality works._

In reality, you are hiding because you are scared.

**But here’s the thing. The Left, right now, has shown they control our elections, the media, and the big corporations.**
**_And if you don’t donate TODAY, the REALITY doesn’t matter. What matters is the control the Democrats will have wrested out of our hands._**

Will you let them do that?

[_Donate TODAY to help us reach our urgent fundraising goal of $50,000 to continue to fight for America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=75f0644936&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=55f5734d55&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| While there has been a torrent of hate and venom sent my way, [I have stood up for this grassroots movement.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3cf09953b1&e=44b8c466b0)

**It is personal to me.**

**While others remained silent, and even declined the invitation to sit on the hearing panel after November 3rd, I stood up to be the voice of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House, imagine what I could do as Secretary of State?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and [I will continue the fight no matter what!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7e7ff5c21d&e=44b8c466b0)_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f680bdfed7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [_Are you in?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3e61ec8006&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=948e98bfd2&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=70b6270b9e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=c763c128b6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=c763c128b6).

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Clear and urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Grassroots support keeps us going.
#
Peter, my friend Bernie Sanders and I are fighting to expand Medicare — and NEW polling shows that voters support us. **[If you want to help Bernie and me make it happen, chip in $3 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210625?refcode=em20210625-407&t=1&refcode2=407_420207_mrb9ia&akid=407%2E420207%2Emrb9ia)**
We have a unique opportunity to build on the American Rescue plan and pass a bold, transformative piece of legislation — one that includes expanding Medicare.
That’s why Bernie and I have been pushing President Biden to (1) lower the Medicare eligibility age, (2) expand Medicare to cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and (3) lower prescription drug costs for everyone.
President Biden supported these policies. A new Data for Progress poll shows that people across America — Democrats and Republicans alike — do too. Now, we must make it law.
[**As Bernie and I continue the fight for Medicare for All, it’s time to make this overwhelmingly popular Medicare expansion the law of the land. We need your continued grassroots support to make it possible. If you agree that we need to expand Medicare, chip in $3 or more right now to fuel our fight to make it a reality.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210625?refcode=em20210625-407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=407_420207_mrb9ia&akid=407%2E420207%2Emrb9ia)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210625?refcode=em20210625-407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=407_420207_mrb9ia&akid=407%2E420207%2Emrb9ia)**
Here’s a reminder of what Bernie and I are fighting for:
* **Lowering the Medicare eligibility age:** This would immediately extend coverage to at least 23 million people, including many who lost insurance during the pandemic. _72% of Democrats and a majority of Republicans agree!_

* **Improving Medicare benefits to finally cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and cap out-of-pocket costs:** This will give folks on Medicare much needed coverage to see the dentist, get hearing aids, and afford a new pair of glasses. _Nearly 90% of Democrats and 76% of Republicans agree!_

* **Empowering Medicare to negotiate drug prices for everyone:** The U.S. spends far more than any other country on prescription drugs, despite Medicare Part D being the largest purchaser. We need the government to use its power to negotiate drug prices down for everyone.

Together, we can enact this historic expansion of health care and lower costs for millions of people.
Thank you so much for your support,
Pramila

Fellow American,

The Democrats are hypocrites.

Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat followers are fighting tooth and nail to DESTROY the filibuster. **The Left used to be FOR the filibuster but now that it no longer serves their agenda, they want to end it.**

name: Erica Smith
subject: Speaking my truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
The rural way of life still runs through my veins.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica!
Asking for financial support before the FEC deadline is absolutely critical, but _always_ uncomfortable.
**So let me tell you more about my childhood in North Carolina,[_before humbly asking you to make your very first $5 donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate before the FEC deadline._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)**
I am the descendant of slaves. I grew up hearing stories from my great-grandfather, the child of slaves, about the Jim Crow South.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)
My five siblings and I were raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that our mother was raised on. My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on a family farm in rural North Carolina, picking cucumbers and corn. The rural way of life still runs through my veins.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)
Growing up Black in the South was difficult, as was farming. **I know what it means to struggle.** But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith. I'm not asking you to "believe it." I am speaking my truth. I am speaking OUR truth.
And in fact, the struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families face today. We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.
That is why I’m running for the U.S. Senate — to create opportunities for communities like mine. No community overlooked, no one counted out. **Together we can win a Green New Deal, guaranteed single-payer health care, reparations, and so much more.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)
If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state on the federal level, let alone in the U.S. Senate!
[**_If you’re with me, will you please make your first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our unapologetic campaign as we hurdle toward the FEC deadline next week._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3364?refcode=em20210625-210&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210625-210-footer&t=25&refcode2=210_3698_n7LGL5&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=210%2E3698%2En7LGL5)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Fellow American,

The Democrats are hypocrites.

Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat followers are fighting tooth and nail to DESTROY the filibuster. **The Left used to be FOR the filibuster but now that it no longer serves their agenda, they want to end it.**

The filibuster ensures the Senate operates democratically and is our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE against the Left’s big-government agenda. Without it, we risk:
**
● Passing Joe Biden’s radical $2 TRILLION infrastructure package
● Unilateral Democrat control in the Senate
● And worst of all, the DISMANTLEMENT OF DEMOCRACY.
** We cannot allow this, Fellow American.

**I need YOU to add your name to our official petition to stop Democrats from dismantling democracy.**

* We must STOP HR1 and the Democrats’ attempts to grab control of elections away from states

# The Washington Post: DeSantis mandates surveys of Florida college students' beliefs

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, JUNE 25, 2021
PHOTO RELEASE: GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS OUTREACH EVENTS IN COASTAL GEORGIA
ATLANTA - Yesterday and today, Greater Georgia hosted a handful of outreach events in Coastal Georgia to discuss the organization's mission and to meet with and engage Georgia voters. The events, held in Statesboro, Savannah, and St. Marys, featured appearances by Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler.
"It was a great way to wrap up a busy week with stops in Coastal Georgia, meeting with nearly 200 hardworking Georgians who are making a big difference in our local communities," said Loeffler. "Together, we can build on a strong framework of voter mobilization and election integrity to support American values in our state."

Fellow American,

The Democrats are hypocrites.

Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat followers are fighting tooth and nail to DESTROY the filibuster. **The Left used to be FOR the filibuster but now that it no longer serves their agenda, they want to end it.**

The filibuster ensures the Senate operates democratically and is our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE against the Left’s big-government agenda. Without it, we risk:
**
● Passing Joe Biden’s radical $2 TRILLION infrastructure package
● Unilateral Democrat control in the Senate
● And worst of all, the DISMANTLEMENT OF DEMOCRACY.
** We cannot allow this, Fellow American.

**I need YOU to add your name to our official petition to stop Democrats from dismantling democracy.**

_Can I count on you to stand with me and FIGHT BACK against the radical Left?_

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Join Me on Sunday for RINO Roast!
body:
We're celebrating the one year anniversary of defending our home from the mob.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P9GAnBNo63XNsFoEs6hT0uRBg-_79f4pUv3HBZjnUQVAL0n3cyj8H3U8WbeRrpWndU8aAfjfca-BoG0bd8vu8GN4ZRrjEEIz0CHPLBd7n0cQ2XUo1msHve-sMHhFC74tdYF-aE3vKOPHFsf200q4SaFqCrQtcnFkfng4KhdOHQ_rnABK7eK-UlzG-2i2rvryhYqVculSXpZtgeOVu6PD5c3viyGifxvLSkMHY4-KlQA6Is2Tr3_cdQ==&c=1tSOlHXQWxlgH2OvIifyhDlE2LIxbtSAewnm6ABMAkpzZZTkg5IBEg==&ch=sEjlfkAAS9Xv7b8aCo3Nwdn0xvkFYZHpSvfaD55UgsjTBzPLmagzZg==)
---
| Fellow Conservative,
One year ago, an angry mob marched onto my property and threatened to kill my family and burn down my house. My wife Patty and I held them off by exercising our 2nd Amendment rights.
And to celebrate the ONE YEAR anniversary of the event, we're throwing a big party this weekend, and you're invited! So come out and join us this Sunday from 2-8 at Drive in St. Louis, check out the details below!
We'll be gathered (WITHOUT MASKS) to talk about the direction of the country, winning back the SENATE from the socialist Democrats, and how we can keep the Republican Party clear of RINO'S now and in the future. So come out, eat some great barbecue, and celebrate our freedom with fellow Conservatives in Missouri.
If you're in or around St. Louis, we'd LOVE for you to drop by so we can meet you. There will be food, live music and adult beverages provided, along with special guest Congressman Madison Cawthorn!
Click the button below to reserve your ticket.
---
| | | [RESERVE YOUR TICKET NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P9GAnBNo63XNsFoEs6hT0uRBg-_79f4pUv3HBZjnUQVAL0n3cyj8H3U8WbeRrpWndU8aAfjfca-BoG0bd8vu8GN4ZRrjEEIz0CHPLBd7n0cQ2XUo1msHve-sMHhFC74tdYF-aE3vKOPHFsf200q4SaFqCrQtcnFkfng4KhdOHQ_rnABK7eK-UlzG-2i2rvryhYqVculSXpZtgeOVu6PD5c3viyGifxvLSkMHY4-KlQA6Is2Tr3_cdQ==&c=1tSOlHXQWxlgH2OvIifyhDlE2LIxbtSAewnm6ABMAkpzZZTkg5IBEg==&ch=sEjlfkAAS9Xv7b8aCo3Nwdn0xvkFYZHpSvfaD55UgsjTBzPLmagzZg==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P9GAnBNo63XNsFoEs6hT0uRBg-_79f4pUv3HBZjnUQVAL0n3cyj8H3U8WbeRrpWndU8aAfjfca-BoG0bd8vu8GN4ZRrjEEIz0CHPLBd7n0cQ2XUo1msHve-sMHhFC74tdYF-aE3vKOPHFsf200q4SaFqCrQtcnFkfng4KhdOHQ_rnABK7eK-UlzG-2i2rvryhYqVculSXpZtgeOVu6PD5c3viyGifxvLSkMHY4-KlQA6Is2Tr3_cdQ==&c=1tSOlHXQWxlgH2OvIifyhDlE2LIxbtSAewnm6ABMAkpzZZTkg5IBEg==&ch=sEjlfkAAS9Xv7b8aCo3Nwdn0xvkFYZHpSvfaD55UgsjTBzPLmagzZg==)

Here are the facts friend:
* Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is June 30th
* The NRSC just launched a six-figure ad campaign against Maggie

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: This is a long email, but it’s important that you read it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

This is a long email, and by the time you’re done reading it, I hope you’ll be as ready as I am to defeat Ron Johnson and get rid of the Senate filibuster. Give me a moment to explain.

With Democrats in control of the White House, the Senate, and the House, we have a critical opportunity to show everyone that the American people are ready to move forward. To show that we will fight for progress on the issues that matter most to working families, and to prove we mean business.

The only thing standing in our way? **The Senate filibuster.**

Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson have made it clear that they intend to block every last bit of progress we hope to make. Just this week, they didn’t even allow a debate on the For the People Act -- let alone a vote.

Peter, the sooner Democrats realize that we need to get rid of the filibuster, the sooner we’re going to start getting things done for the American people -- and the sooner we can start delivering on the promises made to voters.

Millions of folks from all over the country, and especially right here in Wisconsin, voted to advance voting rights, protect our health care, raise the minimum wage, combat climate change, defend workers’ rights, and so much more. It’s our job to act on every single one of these issues and deliver results.

That’s what public servants are supposed to do! But Ron Johnson just doesn’t see it that way. He’d rather collect massive checks from his wealthy donors or spread conspiracy theories on YouTube than help the people of Wisconsin.

I'm committed to working as hard as I can to make sure Ron Johnson is defeated next November. He’s the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election in 2022 -- and Wisconsin will be the tipping-point state that could determine who controls the Senate. But I need your help to build the resources it will take to beat him.

**That's why I'd really appreciate it if you could make a donation of any amount toward our first end-of-quarter goal of this campaign. Peter,

The Democrats are hypocrites.

Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat followers are fighting tooth and nail to DESTROY the filibuster. **The Left used to be FOR the filibuster but now that it no longer serves their agenda, they want to end it.**

The filibuster ensures the Senate operates democratically and is our LAST LINE OF DEFENSE against the Left’s big-government agenda. Without it, we risk:
**
● Passing Joe Biden’s radical $2 TRILLION infrastructure package
● Unilateral Democrat control in the Senate
● And worst of all, the DISMANTLEMENT OF DEMOCRACY.
** We cannot allow this, Peter.

**I need YOU to add your name to our official petition to stop Democrats from dismantling democracy.**

_Can I count on you to stand with me and FIGHT BACK against the radical Left?_

[**Add YOUR NAME to our Official Petition IMMEDIATELY to stand with Senate Republicans and SAVE THE FILIBUSTER. >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7e3018862b9844178b43782e820f964b&_e=n90rcQfZ_xpo4pKgVeRZjB1FmXia0GcDAUkchJKoUkjsXSASRLyo1YTKgG8IntTWXDNrhpwz-wPSxVg0880CtUvjS9hheihX4jewbjnaFbSfgfl-XZX8HHcbY8w4dHGmx-hVIO9cFBa9nJaFRZ-zbVpLQycqI0c_7mNydoyaVXqNtZmx2wI1IO1GVA4QipTONFxmcjbEVwNzDqIMibcENQnb8-4mmp-BW0EHwKLp8dKkiNtOGodAf6M97OXP2x4lox0jNZLlXhd-jQGpGw30CpZAnr4-PeRKi-XsB-xDLZgJOazD5a_PBP3w4aHrQEXwzpTMkOu3otTIWeWShBytW4QaVYSph2ralpPNJ3HGubeZ4p5Dk1KJ9h7alJDLOSZchuPnMrC03wEx8YoP8SDzxODBS3GXcpRfLKn-2h338PNUHcSeztDu-wOetawr9hy9VXLw2KoawYjb6WwkOipJA8xfP2Gpr4EqRl_IITwrLC0%3D)

| Peter,

In 2018, I became the first Democrat to win Virginia's 7th district in 50 years. In 2020, with a challenging re-election, I was proud to win a second term to continue working hard everyday for the people of my district and our country.

Your support in 2018 and 2020 helped ensure we could share our positive message with voters across our ten counties and propel our campaign to victory in two very close races.

We know that 2022 will be our most challenging race yet, but the work we do now lays the groundwork for future success.

[_**As we approach the FEC quarterly filing deadline, will you consider a contribution to my campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MrRebqXeKLMly1ibkbju5MzJFLr4drQuokaS815sJT0=/znWUw_NuEwY9TTCOPQSWzWFf9UAh6ux0HtFQ_3PIo2U=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210625-1-EM&amount=25)

---
By contributing even a small amount before our quarterly deadline, you help make sure we can pay for the critical elements of a successful re-election campaign. subject: A personal note

body:
I am going to ask for a $10 donation to my campaign, but first I want to tell you why. I became Mayor of Helena with the intention of addressing the | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8266a48b72e0450fa5e775b39598a500&_e=3_W_IjS3ifFSTGGIllcvRjN3qGhAd97X66yPuXfEgmZ9qXamKgph2NrhhOkXsF9tYWRIJSi8oP0537MYmVgOjJMN9iwNgjtOscKZJ1RFnpb0AijBWp_xhckPFBMXJV0Hgy0EMW8NipCYhiRhz4geAeJAflX1yZHh3t3Y1doiq_vg-jSmrBaXCMT05d83O0JbIeNgjrhKFDbyqAYQNv38ogck_M3cJG0k6wlwyPMoSO8yZy-19JdJ4pYbUGJdi0Sjx0pq8Ktg46BJOc54Xa3rg29gpUzI_j3arCfzut9nRAE367s_BJUDdJ3DeBAXxfr7rYcNaPyMMuRkBAybJwhaynia_B3G_SqoX4lkBk0RtfveCkAtkT8Pe1w3Am9mty1kCn80G4WrypbNensqtUOWFKVz5jkvpdm0nZSG5Zx5VMFhl2h2xjMdM2OWQrrBjMMpGa7Vh1M1hcJV-wd_Fa6wIisHF2F2ec8JFDDtbtEdy1o%3D) Folks, **[I am going to ask for a $10 donation to my campaign, but first I want to tell you why.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8266a48b72e0450fa5e775b39598a500&_e=g_0RpyIUb5A09jJiR_mpuGllwaBN4WH5udF-VLjupjJDeotEhu-lMP81ZwyDoG_ZAdEjpaP4W5FZDPxJvkVbNjBVb0x2aoE43MGkuWD4i3sOVRZHRpkafi7zfwA1iCFK-qIPjfBV2PQbM-WmUVoKg6GQDI0kBpaBDbs6aGKoQUQajYjscFT7rDf0H0bnMrT7KtQ8UulMcGXGIDTx8GSuvdbvjN9AIg9LppXvVNAeDNwt9ut8CkNiuGXuRmc8ZLf3hFEog4RyzeIPEyztZE0IDU7K8W7O4mIadf2SwFU8XstmWY_9eUOITMYlm3J9PLE3PY8pJAo2el-y0YdJizV1CJsuFwAa8qqmnkW8xpO69hQpE2ZHtd90gCuU4eDv4Z2Ja13lg2wjpxQDkukSAqPO0Piql9jcXDfaFKba_tfzWV7p21jtCUCFSFMbgO5-eHFvnGJqQksTrM7Y_9FS1vThKBrW2Wexn2ZIkxii9BaeMQd5tVFpjZg14GnKrx7usP-Z)** I became Mayor of Helena with the intention of addressing the homelessness crisis, making our city run on clean green energy, and making housing more affordable. Together, we have accomplished that and so much more. Helena is growing and improving at a rapid pace, and I couldn’t be prouder of our progress. We are set to be powered by 100% renewable energy by 2030, have taken major steps to revitalize the economic drivers of tourism and travel within the city, kept vital areas of our city supported through the pandemic, and addressed snow removal issues that have plagued our city for far too long. There is so much to be proud of, and so much more work to be done. **[So, will you help me continue improving our great city by chipping in $10 to my re-election campaign today?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8266a48b72e0450fa5e775b39598a500&_e=g_0RpyIUb5A09jJiR_mpuGllwaBN4WH5udF-VLjupjJDeotEhu-lMP81ZwyDoG_ZAdEjpaP4W5FZDPxJvkVbNjBVb0x2aoE43MGkuWD4i3sOVRZHRpkafi7zfwA1iCFK-qIPjfBV2PQbM-WmUVoKg6GQDI0kBpaBDbs6aGKoQUQajYjscFT7rDf0H0bnMrT7KtQ8UulMcGXGIDTx8GSuvdbvjN9AIg9LppXvVNAeDNwt9ut8CkNiuGXuRmc8ZLf3hFEog4RyzeIPEyztZE0IDZMabpj-baPzoJjlhOtr61mfC31k6AON3acI7k1hzA_1rfgF1_ZlDXrKeJcOV4EmOH8Wu-0PQiPQqHA467OOU9-W0RqV9TvUsMj3JkZw60lNy7EebtpUrCsMpXSk6SqrULWMibHtvouZKP746AxSuMODn3R-p3WUrGhvt7cBgYl0PBMm6jvFxSZ2xWpJo9t8tij1m18i-jO7llVI_LdI3sRT2kdv1JreWRLgFy6_W7In)** [Donate $10](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8266a48b72e0450fa5e775b39598a500&_e=3_W_IjS3ifFSTGGIllcvRjN3qGhAd97X66yPuXfEgmZ9qXamKgph2NrhhOkXsF9tYWRIJSi8oP0537MYmVgOjJMN9iwNgjtOscKZJ1RFnpb0AijBWp_xhckPFBMXJV0Hgy0EMW8NipCYhiRhz4geAeJAflX1yZHh3t3Y1doiq_vg-jSmrBaXCMT05d83O0JbIeNgjrhKFDbyqAYQNv38ogck_M3cJG0k6wlwyPMoSO8yZy-19JdJ4pYbUGJdi0SjoqhJsKSr7QcdhlQ9t8PFw-BtY4iVePcZi-rpJcKnhFOL2wvqBIpsmCIO9zVT3LRzvUxnuV8BpaJ9Z59iSEV_AIps3Zz3p9gGMynCentXg13b4-6ZMKqoG8EmbDTUpWM_4UofWYzdU0FVPhSVZsnlFcXt7pjjb6SGbUSLtx8nL9wfWEEXrIfIWQEYPsnNDdaKcytqQIA4g6I-x3GeetJk3QKuQVKh2UoSEGruq0Zr_fKXzJUH_fgQrl9oXmLFKSMM) Thank you,

name: Official AOC Shop
subject: New drop: the ‘Better climate = Better jobs’ t-shirt is here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Shop our new t-shirt and help build our movement to address the climate crisis while creating millions of good-paying, union jobs.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210625-2237-header&t=1&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)
The only way we can curb climate change, grow our economy, and rebuild the middle class is by putting millions of people to work transitioning our energy to 100% renewables as quickly as possible.
With our upcoming infrastructure investments, we have a historic opportunity to create millions of good jobs and make our generation the most unionized workforce in history — all while repairing infrastructure, reducing pollution, and building a more sustainable world.
**The path forward is clear: Our infrastructure investments must prioritize saving our climate and creating millions of union jobs.**
[If you agree, you can make your stance heard loud and clear with our new 'Better Climate = Better Jobs' t-shirt designed by Erwin Hines.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9134?t=2&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt) As always, proceeds go to building our movement and year-round local organizing — from our very own Homework Helpers tutoring program to deep canvassing.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9134?t=3&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)
**[Shop the new t-shirt →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9134?t=4&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)**
This whole year, we are dedicating our campaign shop to uplifting local and independent artists and community advocacy.
Erwin Hines is an artist, designer, and creative director. He uses design to examine and reflect tensions within the current cultural landscape and some of his current projects include **[Future Is Color](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9135?t=5&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)** and **[Open Gym](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9136?t=6&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)**.
**Our artist collaboration series are limited runs and they rotate periodically – so get yours now before they sell out!**
[**Your purchase of a ‘Better Climate = Better Jobs’ t-shirt will help fund our work to educate our communities about the Green New Deal and organize to get it passed — click here to shop now.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9134?t=7&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210625-2237-P&t=8&refcode2=2237_2526796_OJpGQt&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=9&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=10&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=11&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=12&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=2237%2E2526796%2EOJpGQt)

body:

clean_body: Friend, You know me -- you know I’m honored to serve as a Delegate for Virginia, and you know I will always fight for the people of this great Commonwealth. Now that we’re back in action I need to know what’s at the top of your mind to ensure that our leaders are fighting for the reforms that our grassroots supporters expect from us. Will you respond to my team’s priority survey and let me know exactly what I should focus on first after we take back the majority in the House of Delegates? I have a proven record of fighting for what’s important, but with so many crucial issues coming up, I need to know what’s most important to you. Let me know what that is here: . Thank you, Nick Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: We can't go backwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=afd8d8da20)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hey Derek-

We can't afford to go backwards now. We have made so much forward progress over the past 4 years here in Virginia and in the US. Now that we have a Democratic President, we can't sit back and become complacent.

In Virginia, we have to fight against both complacency and the Republican Ticket. If given the opportunity, Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares along with Minority Leader Todd Gilbert would take us back decades when it comes to voting rights, reproductive rights, economic justice, and environmental justice. We can't let that happen. Virginians can't afford it.
[Chip](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=dd32c65970&e=76fc145c69)[ in Now to Help Push Progressive Change](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=70027901db&e=76fc145c69)
We also can't just bank on the messaging of "it could be worse" under Republican control. Let's get out there and show Virginians how Democrats can deliver on the issues that affect them everyday. From calling on Congress to pass the PRO Act and the American Jobs Plan to pushing for Progressives to be elected in the House of Delegates here in Virginia to deliver at the state level, we have so many opportunities to continue our good work.

[Let's get to work!](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=aec34b9034&e=76fc145c69)[ Can you help now by giving $5, $10, $25, or $100 now to help promote this message throughout Virginia? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=a826d806a1&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: A Week in Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
What a week on the campaign trail! As we drive around our Commonwealth each week, we see Virginians eager to unite together and bring much
|
---
| | |
---|---|---
Dear Friends, What a week on the campaign trail! As we drive around our Commonwealth each week, we see Virginians eager to unite together and bring much needed positive change to our Commonwealth. And that starts with building a safer and more secure Virginia.
---
| | |
---|---|---
Yesterday, I launched my policy plan to combat human trafficking. I was honored to be joined by champions of this cause and courageous survivors.
---
[ ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VW4QDH8GdZDwMk6lzBXTNksW8LzBkh4tfDvqN4Tr4NB3lGnpV1-WJV7CgNJhW7T68vn7kBdpTW1BCKvg58p0smW3cdg8p77BKB0W1jN1pW27SgTVW40HDK88Rg8kTW7bqbRV17ksHvW28Z2Bx712Rr7W80hPQT9cxxNMVfQZSd3CwzJTW9cMGH41JxhSXW2XcT3n3cShWpW2qc77b8QTz3qN3l_lVsLKmB3W2HBPLx79vw74W195CMl2f4bvLW2kwW8-20MjZ-VBkMs855TL57W98G6Sg5w6LXwW48fCXG1M049_W3WDKMH8ckSqvW4mgjYg5TT8B1VfpxyX2sNMwfVFKrlJ6y8npfW38jRR57HdLbvW1_zsNN2__xH6W1Vmmj59llRmB31rV1)
---
_"When I am governor, we will not only bring the full weight of the law down on traffickers and buyers, we will also equip survivors to heal and flourish. Human trafficking is slavery in our time. It leads to the tragic consequences of lives lost to addiction and suicide. I commit to end this exploitation, end this abuse, and to rid our state of this evil criminal enterprise."_
---
| | |
---|---|---
From boxing gyms to our rally in Chesterfield County, we're connecting with voters across the Commonwealth - talking about important issues like supporting our Law Enforcement Officers and pushing back against Critical Race Theory in our schools.
---
[ ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VW4QDH8GdZDwMk6lzBXTNksW8LzBkh4tfDvqN4Tr4M_3lGmQV1-WJV7CgF7HW4Sl5Hc28k_5NW7ngm_c2_TM-lM5kJvzQ6QxvW1LWBc82pL3n6VbJZG58x2xkvW8H2rC46bmQgXW3BY7H83TgZhzN12-LR2J5s8wW31qmKl58L1MbW4mwjGQ2YTl9SW5B3mNF8s1zPTW2Z13dK7pn2cyW3kp53n2FmpFpW1YSZ_13YQ6GnW3DmRKH6xscfMW8qPGSc1X_xGTW3Xz6Vd3G7xTVW1S2HCk3ZJN4lW8cxl4B33DV-tW4Y6pv88hP5mpW3n0Nn53GdTWkW82XS2F7xfvWq33CL1)

We also launched our Merchandise Store (#WinWithGlenn store) where you can find all our latest apparel - head on over there to gear up and show your support of Team Youngkin as we work together to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family!

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: BREAKING: New video shows vulnerable Republican going on "Nazi" rant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/75177/images/areyoutheregoditsmetheoldnazi.png]
Friend,
Today, a video emerged of vulnerable radical right-wing Congressman Scott Perry comparing Democrats to Nazis and trashing them as "traitors" with a "plan to destroy our country."
Pretty rich coming from the guy who was a key instigator of the January 6 insurrection where ACTUAL NAZIS were proudly part of the mob that attacked our seat of government in an attempt to overthrow our democracy.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scottperrydanger [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scottperrydanger]
We've seen this kind of thing from other radical right-wing extremists. They try to hide their own heinous actions from view by falsely accusing their opponents of doing what they're doing. Republican or Democrat, we've learned the hard way we can't write this off as absurd political theater because there are very real consequences for our country and the security of our democracy.
Can you donate what you can to help us build a movement to protect our democracy from radical extremists in Congress?
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=25]

$500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=100] $1,000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=250]

body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/have-you-signed-our-petition?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=efdb902b75&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, Friends, the bureaucrats in Washington D.C. are covering up the murder of Senior Airmen Ashli Babbitt, a veteran and mother. **She was executed by the state for trespassing at the Capitol -- the PEOPLE’s HOUSE. ** In the face of the Communist Democrats and RINOs, I’m demanding answers about her death. They want to sweep it under the rug, but I won’t let them. [**Will you sign my “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition today and help me hold her killers accountable**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9fb39ba4bd&e=645b3b1338)?
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dc29d55851&e=645b3b1338 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| [**In order to demand answers, I need you to sign my petition right away and make sure to forward it to at least five of your family members and friends, and make sure they do the same**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9f7428099e&e=645b3b1338). The entire establishment is working hard to cover up the events of January 6 that led to Ashli Babbitt’s killing. Revolver News and Tucker Carlson recently exposed that unindicted co-conspirators from that day -- who haven’t been named or arrested -- might be federal agents who were involved in inciting violence at the Capitol. Federal authorities are REFUSING to release 14,000 hours of video footage from that day. **[What are they hiding, and why are they hiding it](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=146199ba95&e=645b3b1338)? ** [**The way to help me get to the bottom of this mess is by signing my “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition right away**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=aaae1cf896&e=645b3b1338). [**Enough signatures will put pressure on the rest of Congress -- my colleagues -- to step up and help me demand answers about Ashli Babbitt’s death, and the events leading up to it**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7ac0b2ae8b&e=645b3b1338). I’m not supposed to be asking these questions. Neither are you. The establishment wants us to shut up and go away. They want us to accept the bogus “insurrection” narrative. They want us to believe that Ashli Babbitt “got what she deserved.” [**Sign the “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition right away, and tell the D.C. Swamp creatures that we’re not going anywhere until we get the answers we deserve**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ed81dd8d7e&e=645b3b1338). Right now, I’m in the trenches battling all the powerful interests working against our effort to expose the truth. They’ve made me their NUMBER ONE target, simply for asking questions. [**That’s why it’s critical that after you sign the petition, you also chip into my reelection campaign so I can continue leading this battle**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d8867f074e&e=645b3b1338). But please, don’t wait. Ashli Babbitt’s family and the American people deserve answers -- now. **That’s why it’s vital that you take action now, and sign my petition demanding justice for Ashli Babbitt**. [**And why I need you to contribute $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or more to my reelection campaign today, so we can effectively take the fight to the establishment and get our petition circulated**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0eb8e6897f&e=645b3b1338). Thank you in advance for taking action today. Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1d8c302ea6&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District

clean_body: We have less than 24 hours until Trump’s Save America Rally. Trump’s here because he knows Ohio and our race is critical to stopping Nancy Pelosi. | Peter, We have less than 24 hours until Trump’s Save America Rally and 5 weeks away from the special election. We need to start this campaign off on the right foot if we’re going to keep it in Republican hands. Trump’s here because he knows Ohio and winning our race is critical to stopping Nancy Pelosi. We need to win back the house and get America back on track with America First policies, but we have to start now. We can’t win back the house if I lose this election. It’s that simple Peter. If we don’t win this seat, then Nancy Pelosi will have an easier time keeping her stranglehold of Congress. If you’re serious about putting America First and defending Trump’s legacy, then help me win this seat. I have Donald Trump’s endorsement but Let’s win back America and get things back on track. name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s starting . . .
body:
When I wrote yesterday, I asked you not to be discouraged.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg/QePTlVEa8aQ71892gvbBvFRw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg/QePTlVEa8aQ71892gvbBvFRw) When I wrote yesterday, I asked you not to be discouraged.

The Radical Left has reached its peak of power and the pendulum is swinging our way . . . and we're seeing the results.

At this time in the 2020 election season, the DCCC outraised its Republican counterpart, the NRCC by 32%.

This year, the NRCC is ahead in fundraising by 43% and Republican candidates around the country are starting early to build a war chest for victory in 2022!

And I'm part of that, and so are you!

**There are just five days left until the FEC deadline,[so please donate as much as you can](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg/QePTlVEa8aQ71892gvbBvFRw).**

Small victories like hitting fundraising goals builds momentum. It attracts attention from those who are discouraged by politics.

When you donate, you're not just helping my campaign - you're building momentum for all of us. You're waking up patriots around the nation and telling them **to get back in the fight to save America!**

So please, help me meet my fundraising goal. [**If you can give $10, $20, $100 or more, it will be great and I really appreciate it.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg/QePTlVEa8aQ71892gvbBvFRw)

Thanks so much,

Laura Loomer

P.S. At midnight on June 30th, we hit the fundraising deadline. I'm worried we won't hit our goal so [**I would really appreciate anything you can do to help**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg/QePTlVEa8aQ71892gvbBvFRw).

Look, National Republicans are committed to winning back this seat.

clean_body: sorry to be so direct | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Far-right Republicans are already targeting me, and the experts say that I’m running in a swing district. If I fall short now, this campaign could be in big trouble. But it’s not all doom and gloom -- I just talked to my Finance Director and she said if we raise $2,500 today, we’ll get back on track! | | | | | | | Look, National Republicans are committed to winning back this seat. They defeated four California Democrats last year. And they know that if they win five more seats next year, they’ll take back the House Majority. We can’t let that happen! President Biden is counting on us in order to pass his agenda and make America stronger than before. | | | | | | I can’t do this without you, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: America is NOT a racist country.
body:
| | | | Yet far-left, woke activists are trying to destroy America...
---
---
Dear Peter,
America is a great nation and NOT a racist country. Yet far-left, woke activists are trying to destroy America, the Constitution, and so many institutions and systems which are central to the success of our republic.
Critical race theory is an abomination and must be rejected. _Advocates of this philosophy are pushing for socialism and intend to achieve their goals by advancing a revisionist history of how America came to be and who we are today._
As one of the leading Attorneys General fighting to Defend America, I know that we must do everything in our power to block critical race theory from being taught in the schools— it’s inherently the opposite of what we need in our country.
_It’s just plain wrong to judge people on the color of their skin instead of the content of their character._
That’s why today, _I am launching a_ _new effort to help ban critical race theory._ Last month, [I joined my attorneys general colleagues in an effort to block the use of federal funds to teach critical race theory.](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNAz2GrMrsQXOHHi6Hkka-2BBo2oz3-2FBjd83P79WMYAuWpbuYmWo3-2BIji2V8ftH75HGiT6BtrgzVHNWuTxgwUr9Tl2OFNQo8MVnR-2Fyej5Wd9Ch7mMxM6_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhMgC5LtomTpJW6bQ4-2BF5gH4zjAoSNl76-2FeUXNxQC30pWxG-2BbBuZ7rwltdUys0HNDsEZZJytIVTQ2llAe9PDPLs2b1Bk9AtRpi67GT9zc13xkZVRSCOB3YwDZGBCHCX8IdKn56R-2BC3lNodArqQl352aVZprPiD3j2iXE6oNMs3PtWZfpgrXpDZk3oDEHqH221JccboNNp-2FN0AgEvjM7jHL53OJg1HPkD0p88Ot2gV8AoT-2BuauGmxM-2Bz690VnoS9tQNahLjLra2UmtRNJEjNex0l1tFceXn33YYszVYGm6Rn6ymiEUxVgoKl9tvZcPTy4TOGP-2BVx2ALaQH3Fx0hT6kXbC066M-2BhYlanP558ZYuQKOArS1A2iAeGocWFQNmoRIZFLxq8CyXwfrGbPhRhwduGf-2FzyJuI1jCznlX-2BsK-2FckjO1n2X6FZJkD390b-2BO9J1SN6WgYLCU8YxS7RidpqlVKQtZp6I6qpo-2Bd0q11Q4yPT1U9y1n-2F3c670UsRmBZS4vEBgA9tpMm-2FTXSXnIMOuWekINHJW7ZGprC8AMTWvsWNFzBstzC-2BncHLaQ1-2B7CSoa-2BfMX9T4ScRe-2Fm-2B-2F0AOT-2FyTrxGlR-2F5n6NOM4X-2FA40tZ8ViKJhwlE1CPcAhn-2BXLGMYzmbQw-2F0mHH90Y7T0VkQxlRGFJuYSSKO5MgSZuhw-2B3GpyhiEwJ5950WyaEWEmZsaJu1ldp1AGRn6cJ1O7Z487C82fd3D2kNKX8wg26ctgycQ3Pig9TQfEplorGb-2FTFoHOigysnR9Iq1LdFP4hXQVqaWGmao3flRc6hvHwAZvC2KkfC0eE0WNdtd3hEVBfual-2F7Fm83-2B-2FPXEiaMQw7ptI2-2BY43D6IvDuRRmydcO9DV5GxyUnlMVpNVYw2HPoU9ciJB932atUqMqXMFK-2BV3t2qP74WBiUVbxL79Q2bW8a6Anr9lBzg-3D-3D)
Now, we must do the same in states across America. West Virginia, Virginia, and many other states must step up and ensure that our students won’t be brainwashed or taught that America is a bad country.
Will you join our efforts?

clean_body: | | | | Yet far-left, woke activists are trying to destroy America... Dear Peter, America is a great nation and NOT a racist country. Yet far-left, woke activists are trying to destroy America, the Constitution, and so many institutions and systems which are central to the success of our republic. Critical race theory is an abomination and must be rejected. Advocates of this philosophy are pushing for socialism and intend to achieve their goals by advancing a revisionist history of how America came to be and who we are today. As one of the leading Attorneys General fighting to Defend America, I know that we must do everything in our power to block critical race theory from being taught in the schools— it’s inherently the opposite of what we need in our country. It’s just plain wrong to judge people on the color of their skin instead of the content of their character. That’s why today, I am launching a new effort to help ban critical race theory. Last month, Now, we must do the same in states across America. West Virginia, Virginia, and many other states must step up and ensure that our students won’t be brainwashed or taught that America is a bad country. Will you join our efforts? To help us fight against critical race theory, Your support will amplify our voice and stop the far-left in its tracks. Thank you. For Freedom and our Constitution. Attorney General Patrick Morrisey | | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 \- =

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With President Trump coming back to Ohio, events across the state, and the closing of the 2nd quarter, the campaign had another busy and productive week. Jane continues to crisscross the state proving that she is the grassroots, America First candidate we need in the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Setting the Record Straight** This morning, longtime ORP State Central Committeeman Dave Johnson and 31 Conservative Leaders across the state sent a letter to party leadership setting the record straight on exactly who is true Trump champion for Ohio: Jane Timken. “With President Trump’s return to Ohio this Saturday, you will hear a lot of talk from candidates for U.S. Senate about their support of President Trump and his policies. Now is the time to set the record straight. From most, it is only empty rhetoric and phony claims, things we hear far too often from career politicians. We felt it is of the utmost importance for the future of Ohio that you, and Republican voters across Ohio, are aware and know the difference between who was with President Trump through thick and thin, and who is now only using him in order to selfishly get what they want – power, media headlines, and career advancement. There is only one candidate for U.S. Senate who can claim to be the Trump champion for Ohio, and that is unequivocally Jane Timken. Throughout the last 5 years, there has been no stronger supporter of President Trump than Jane Timken in Ohio.” Read the full letter [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b5d567bc91714aa088bab3a57079437a&_e=X7yG7lDG5jxevjUgLi-x34vOw-H4tQaA0uS5SGvcksEeH8rmB2NT1YvT-I6F796g38BuUMRto4WOTLmYebk718KwVkaQn1lEoJedNn6gWPEfrRpqlscYX9-3gzxjnDqQj91rmzgCbpTwdJUUWMppWD8EiUfezSaZ3KxzZdkQ-W11yHpDJE4_eCqZSRr6eBM4NFLztPS63U7bIK0evpG8Z_CbMylwTq481oCLRN1rzUDknFGrSKfuAWFH5xac_Xn8GQ3ZVYNOs7D9hlHXzAz-O1NKktRwfg5VDMg0mEoT7rLPcYpQJFxuEl2iHi8sALK7NW1uELjBNVZQcUQeKT2i9PpfJh729Qcqe_gnsGEtTyrS1YcV7r3hSPysXM17hfjD). **From the Trail** Jane started her week with a great event in Lorain County on Monday night. As fired up as they were to see Jane, I have no doubt that President Trump will be welcomed with open arms on Saturday night. On Tuesday, Jane had events with supporters in Wooster and Findlay as she continued to travel the state. Everywhere she goes, conservatives are fired up for her America First message. You can read more about her Findlay stop and campaign message here in the [Findlay Courier](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b5d567bc91714aa088bab3a57079437a&_e=X7yG7lDG5jxevjUgLi-x37mrWXOFzSjzfeXTPlkX3c40G3N7j6WS__8koCzeceepYw2URQz8DxSycY4woA0nMod-owB82O7l7bCVrcq3bKBAVg6EQ_3jJb4DjFnlX25VMXfkqv-hvvQXPFiNRkglPxm25A9JTfQ5hvk03ng0w96FrTet50dgIYJb0-8GD31Mg7fi4RGihKQY2H5go2ie9DrZmispdUVZZ-DK7yKmz7DAu0vTBqa_azYz_GGiUPHZY8QeFBCh5k35xL98KCCnBU6lQ2c41uXdg1L3BMH2DpbZHSiF_XfxQc9af599tHOqPCH_KKhnPgIE5fpt0xzU83jkXa-zGMeOxdF5G-3WHl8%3D). Jane joined the Erie County Republican Party on Wednesday for their annual Lincoln Day Dinner. It was a great event celebrating the GOP spirit and a great time for Jane to catch up with old friends and make new ones. **Latest Endorsements** Maggie’s List, a national group created to empower and increase the number of conservative women elected to federal public office, unveiled its first round of national endorsements this week. Jane was honored to be the first and only U.S. Senate candidate in the country endorsed by Maggie’s List so far this cycle. “Voters made history in 2020 by electing the largest-ever group of conservative women to federal office, and we are ready to build upon those gains in upcoming elections," Maggie’s List President Sandra Mortham told Fox News. "Maggie’s List-endorsed candidates understand that the only way to move our country in a positive direction is to focus on fiscal responsibility, strong national defense and personal responsibility. Our grassroots network is already hard at work earning support for Maggie’s List candidates in their primary and general election races, and we look forward to helping them secure victories this year and next," Mortham added. The list of endorsements includes former Ohio GOP chair Jane Timken, who's running in a crowded Republican Senate primary in the race to succeed retiring GOP Sen. Rob Portman.” Read the full story from Fox News [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b5d567bc91714aa088bab3a57079437a&_e=X7yG7lDG5jxevjUgLi-x33-4wKBTMlsmIu4iGf5fyzarU28Bw9dBQnSIwKInY7wGfdfXjOKASwitSvmbQmN_l4CEIs-3B04ijphgHouvGDskivO5OHZtlLpOridp65zRjUsr-c_Ysz1L2FD0-CmVPNgfqvubgXuqLhMvJIEG7rso89bHfcbXkRQXNh8h87Oyy-D2MbG589BDPi8plvhdNNyOslKSrC-yt5qD42QIVk-aVrwhwuajrykOSepTwIuPBjOdEolMHhG0Vx1KvEJ2r42--VlU0Cs5ar6eihJ6CjoIauV_JaMwniAC8Oe-nuObi9bdvQiyN09CxLPt7iZ1bg%3D%3D). **Welcome Back, President Trump!** Ahead of President Trump’s rally tomorrow, the campaign released our second radio ad of the cycle, welcoming him back to Ohio. As the only true America First candidate in the race, Jane is thrilled to see President Trump tomorrow. The script reads in part: **"I’m excited that President Trump is coming to Ohio this Saturday. Nothing energizes our conservatives grassroots more than a Trump rally!** ** ** **With the Biden liberals advancing their socialist agenda, President Trump’s voice has never been more important.** ** ** **I was very proud to be endorsed by President Trump to lead our Party. As the Ohio GOP Chairman, I raised hundreds of thousands of dollars for our President, put over 150,000 miles on my cars and campaigned in all 88 counties to deliver a decisive 8-point win for President Trump.** ** ** **No other Senate candidate has worked harder for President Trump and no one is more committed to advancing his America First agenda than me..."** [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b5d567bc91714aa088bab3a57079437a&_e=X7yG7lDG5jxevjUgLi-x3wIe5D1pypTUe-mQ8JKeXfMhJ_PukCfwMaJ3DLzdMoe_pLyipvBT2VK-d5GI6dhAvgmHdl1bAdd9BZD7pTDE0ogb5-d4lKekgo9BcR4K0s4azuloCwlo8XkB3tHeXTI69ewIYVE7JYPmsL66iCuaEcxx00YrOz9_QgACO9SaKhaEheoXFlRO78Hk90Uwevr0ndadujMxCfD0C0WWkTWikKF-WqIrizsPjlXk4G2Yqzybi9OzR7L4P1YMDc4iDvjYfILAR6SxuGS2VLlqKzjK9fA%3D)
I hope everyone has a great weekend and we’ll see you in Lorain County tomorrow!
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

Peter,

**Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**This week Granite Staters have a lot to be excited about. ****

We started this week with a strong message for Senators Maggie Hassan and Jeanne Shaheen - HR1/S1 has no place in New Hampshire and our elections should be run locally, not federally. More than 30 volunteers rallied outside of Senator Hassan’s office in over 90-degree heat! Demonstrations like this exemplify the incredible teamwork and willingness of Republicans to ensure our ‘Live Free’ state holds true to its name!

In another extraordinary win for our state, thanks to the direction of Governor Chris Sununu, Senate President Chuck Morse, and House Speaker Sherman Packard, Republicans were able to take the lead and truly deliver for Granite Staters.

This unified effort facilitated long-standing goals to completion. Through tax cuts, the elimination of the Interests & Dividends Tax, reduced spending, and an overall balanced approach, we’re putting money back into the pockets of hard-working NH families. We’ve expanded education access for students, made measures to prevent discriminatory language associated with CRT, and are providing parents with more options than ever before. Best of all, this budget works to benefit every single Granite Stater, even those yet to be born, having increased safeguards on our children’s right to life!

Every achievement we make is a testament to the ability of Republicans to organize, adapt, and persevere for the good of our families, our state, and our country. I would like to thank all of our Republican legislators, and leaders for their dedication to seeing this budget through the finish line.
**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

**House Republicans Applaud Signing of State Budget Into Law
**
_
__Concord, NH: Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) and Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) released the following statement after Governor Sununu Signed HB 1 and HB 2 into law:
_
**Speaker Sherman Packard:****
“Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed an historic budget that is balanced and fiscally responsible. Today, Governor Sununu signed this transformational budget package into law. Republicans delivered on tax cuts, reduced spending, education freedom, much needed mental health services and more without raising taxes or increasing spending. This is one of the most comprehensive budgets we have seen in years, and it will be the strong foundation needed to help get New Hampshire families and Main Street businesses back on their feet and thriving.”
**
**Majority Leader Jason Osborne: ****
“When the people of New Hampshire put Republicans back in the Majority in 2020 it’s because we promised to cut taxes, reign in the Democrats’ bloated spending, and preserve the New Hampshire Advantage”, said Osborne. “This transformational budget delivered a $170 million total cut from every tax on the books while still funding our state’s needs. We empowered families to find the best fit for their child’s educational needs, passed some needed reform to the governor’s emergency powers, and put an end to teaching the unfounded idea that an individual is inherently racist simply due to the color of their skin. We delivered a $100 million statewide property tax cut, giving our residents direct relief. Our constituents demanded results on these issues, and House Republicans united to make sure we delivered. Granite Staters will be reaping the rewards of this transformational symphony of reforms for years to come and I look forward to building on our success next year.”****
###****
**

**Spending plan for FY22-FY23 based on GOP agenda; works for all NH!**

---
| CONCORD, NH – The New Hampshire House and Senate today reached a deal on a new state budget for FY22-FY23. Members of the Committee of Conference on HB2, led by Republicans, agreed on the $13.5B spending plan for the new biennium beginning on July 1, 2021.

House Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry), and Senate President Chuck Morse (R-Salem), issued the following statement regarding the agreement:

House Speaker Packard:“Today we reached an important milestone in our state budget process by coming to an agreement with our Senate counterparts. This budget is a fiscally conservative and balanced budget that enables New Hampshire families to keep more of their own hard-earned money by providing tax relief. It helps our business community thrive and will help sustain our economic growth. It improves both the education system and boosts much needed funds for mental health and substance abuse programs. These are promises we made to the New Hampshire voters in 2020, and these are promises that we are delivering results on. I recognize all of the hard work and dedication put into this budget process by both House and Senate members. I am proud of our citizen legislature’s commitment to spending tax dollars responsibly. This is never an easy process, but we were able to come together and agree upon a product that will enhance our economy and keep New Hampshire moving in the right direction.”

Senate President Morse:“The budget we passed today reflects the strong Republican agenda we put forward last January, the same one the voters supported. It’s balanced, lives within our means, helps working families, supports Main Street businesses, protects taxpayers, cares for our most vulnerable, improves education, funds mental health and substance abuse programs, reduces regulatory burdens and keeps New Hampshire streets and homes safe.”“I appreciate the long hours and thoughtful consideration of the House and Senate members on the Committee of Conference for HB 2 that enabled us to reach a mutual agreement on state spending for the next two years. The budget process is long and complex. It requires us to start with reliable revenues estimates, to focus on priorities and to separate wants from needs, which is exactly what we did.”

Budget Highlights: Taxpayers
* Provides property tax relief to every New Hampshire homeowner
* Lowers taxes on New Hampshire’s small businesses
* Phases out Interest & Dividends Tax to help seniors and the disabled

Property Taxes
* Sends $100M directly back to property taxpayers
* Sends an additional $188M from Meals & Rooms revenue back to cities and towns forproperty tax relief – an increase of $50.5M over the last budget
* For the first time, puts 30% of revenues from the Meals & Rooms Tax into a dedicatedTrust Fund for distribution to cities and towns

Small Business
* Cuts business taxes (BET and BPT) and increases threshold for BET filing
* Reduces Meals & Rooms Tax for first time in decades
* Exempts Paycheck Protection Program(PPP) loans from state taxation

Public Safety
* Makes investments in Granite Shield, which continues to work on drug trafficking interdiction aimed at preventing the supply of illegal drugs from entering NH
* Funds the Commission on Law Enforcement Accountability, Community, and Transparency recommendations for body cameras, which reduce complaints filed against police officers and provide evidence when an incident occurs
* Provides $500,000 for Internet Crimes Against Children Fund

Education
* Creates Education Freedom Accounts to give low-income New Hampshire families more choices for their children’s education
* Corrects education funding formula to ensure schools are not hurt by COVID enrollment drop, providing $67M in additional aid
* Provides $30M for school Building Aid
* Reserves $35M in Education Relief Aid for schools most in need
* Fund’s Governor’s Scholarship Fund
* Increases funding to towns that expand to full-day Kindergarten

Protecting our Environment
* Provides $15.6M for state aid grants to keep our water clean
* Consolidates Public Utilities Commission and Office of Strategic Initiative into a newDepartment of Energy to guide energy policy decisions such as development of offshore wind power

Substance Misuse
* Continues to build on the progress made in combating the opioid crisis
* Provides over $100M in funding to address substance abuse

Mental Health
* Fully funds new forensic psychiatric hospital to free up beds at the NH Hospital and transfer patients from the secure psychiatric unit at the state prison
* Funds transitional beds to reduce emergency room mental health boarding crisis
* Provides $8M for community mental health programs and mobile crisis teams
* Fully funds the Developmentally Disabled Wait List
* Provides $3M to help veterans and seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.

Seniors
* Eliminates Interest & Dividends Tax on retirement savings
* Increases funding for Senior Support Services
* Provides $1.5M to help seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.

Capital Budget
* Funds state projects all across NH
* Leverages $25M in additional federal funds to address more projects, reducing futurecosts

Veterans
* Increases funding for Veterans Support Services
* Creates National Guard Enlistment Incentive Program
* Provides $1.5M to help veterans recover from social isolation of the COVID-19pandemic.

Affordable Housing

* Adds $25M to the Affordable Housing Fund, leveraging an estimated $300M in additional private investment
* Continues current affordable housing funds through Real Estate Transfer Tax
* Provides $100 million in direct tax relief for property taxpayers

He passionately fought for every single student in New Hampshire. Thank you, Representative, for your hard work and willingness to tackle important issues facing our state’s youth.
